./scripts/show-backup-settings.sh [database_path] Configurations table mein backup_settings value ke contents ko ek formatted table mein display karta hai. Notification configurations ko debug karne ke liye upyogi hai. Default database path: data/backups.db.

Application ko Docker, Portainer Stacks, ya Podman ka upyog karke deploy kiya ja sakta hai. Installation ke baad, aap TIMEZONE ko configure karna chah sakte hain, jaisa ki Configure Timezone mein bataya gaya hai aur backup logs ko duplistatus mein bhejane ke liye Duplicati servers ko configure karne ki zaroorat hogi, jaisa ki Duplicati Configuration section mein bataya gaya hai.

Sunishchit karein ki aapne nimnalikhit install kar liya hai: Docker Engine - Debian installation guide Docker Compose - Linux installation guide Portainer (optional) - Docker installation guide Podman (optional) - Installation guide

duplistatus version 0.9.x se user authentication ki zaroorat hoti hai. Ek default admin account application ko pehli baar install karne ya pehle ke version se upgrade karne par automatically banaya jaata hai: username: admin password: Duplistatus09 Pehla login karne ke baad aap Settings > Users mein additional user accounts bana sakte hain. IMPORTANT Pranali ek minimum password length aur complexity ko enforce karti hai. In requirements ko PWD_ENFORCE aur PWD_MIN_LEN environment variables ka upyog karke adjust kiya ja sakta hai. Paryapt complexity ya kam length wale password ka upyog karne se suraksha compromised ho sakti hai. Kripya in settings ka upyog savdhani se karein.
Aap yahan se images ka upyog kar sakte hain: Docker Hub: docker.io/wsjbr/duplistatus:latest GitHub Container Registry: ghcr.io/wsj-br/duplistatus:latest

Local deployments ke liye ya jab aap configuration ko customize karna chahte hain, yeh recommended method hai. Yeh sabhi settings ke saath container ko define aur run karne ke liye ek docker compose file ka upyog karta hai. # download the compose file wget https://github.com/wsj-br/duplistatus/raw/refs/heads/master/production.yml -O duplistatus.yml # start the container docker compose -f duplistatus.yml up -d Timezone aur number/date/time format ko kaise adjust karna hai, iske baare mein adhik vivaran ke liye Timezone section check karein.

Apne Portainer server mein "Stacks" par jaayen aur "Add stack" par click karein. Apne stack ko naam dein (jaise, "duplistatus"). "Build method" ke roop mein "Web editor" chunein. Isse web editor mein copy aur paste karein: # duplistatus production compose.yml services: duplistatus: image: ghcr.io/wsj-br/duplistatus:latest container_name: duplistatus restart: unless-stopped environment: - TZ=Europe/London - PWD_ENFORCE=true - PWD_MIN_LEN=8 ports: - "9666:9666" volumes: - duplistatus_data:/app/data networks: - duplistatus_network networks: duplistatus_network: driver: bridge volumes: duplistatus_data: name: duplistatus_data Timezone aur number/date/time format ko kaise adjust karna hai, iske baare mein adhik vivaran ke liye Timezone section check karein. "Deploy the stack" par click karein.

Portainer mein, "Stacks" par jaayen aur "Add stack" par click karein. Apne stack ko naam dein (jaise, "duplistatus"). "Build method" ke roop mein "Repository" chunein. Repository URL enter karein: https://github.com/wsj-br/duplistatus.git "Compose path" field mein, enter karein: production.yml (optional) "Environment variables" section mein TZ, LANG, PWD_ENFORCE aur PWD_MIN_LEN environment variables set karein. Timezone aur number/date/time format ko kaise adjust karna hai, iske baare mein adhik vivaran ke liye Timezone section check karein. "Deploy the stack" par click karein.

# Create the volume docker volume create duplistatus_data # Start the container docker run -d \ --name duplistatus \ -p 9666:9666 \ -e TZ=Europe/London \ -e LANG=en_GB \ -v duplistatus_data:/app/data \ ghcr.io/wsj-br/duplistatus:latest duplistatus_data volume ka upyog sthaayi sanchayan ke liye kiya jaata hai. Container image Europe/London ko default timezone aur en_GB ko default locale (bhaasha) ke roop mein istemaal karta hai.

Saadhaaran setup ke liye, aap bina DNS configuration ke container shuru kar sakte hain: mkdir -p ~/duplistatus_data # Start the container (standalone) podman run -d \ --name duplistatus \ --userns=keep-id \ -e TZ=Europe/London \ -e LANG=en_GB \ -p 9666:9666 \ -v ~/duplistatus_data:/app/data \ ghcr.io/wsj-br/duplistatus:latest Podman Containers ke liye DNS configure karna​ Yadi aapko anukoolit DNS configuration (udaaharan ke liye, Tailscale MagicDNS, corporate network, ya anukoolit DNS setup) ki zaroorat hai, to aap DNS server aur search domain ko manually configure kar sakte hain. Apna DNS configuration dhundhna: systemd-resolved systems ke liye (adhikaansh aadhunik Linux distributions): # Get DNS servers resolvectl status | grep "DNS Servers:" | awk '{print "--dns " $3}' # Get DNS search domains resolvectl status | grep "DNS Domain:" | awk '{print "--dns-search " $3}' non-systemd systems ke liye ya fallback ke roop mein: cat /run/systemd/resolve/resolv.conf 2>/dev/null || cat /etc/resolv.conf nameserver (DNS server ke liye) aur search (search domain ke liye) se shuru hone wali lines dekhein. Yadi aap apne DNS settings ya network search domain ke baare mein anishchit hain, to is jaankari ke liye apne network administrator se sampark karein. DNS configuration ka udaharan: mkdir -p ~/duplistatus_data # Start the container with DNS configuration podman run -d \ --name duplistatus \ --userns=keep-id \ --dns 100.100.100.100 \ --dns-search example.com \ -e TZ=Europe/London \ -e LANG=en_GB \ -p 9666:9666 \ -v ~/duplistatus_data:/app/data \ ghcr.io/wsj-br/duplistatus:latest Aap multiple --dns flags jodkar multiple DNS server specify kar sakte hain: --dns 8.8.8.8 --dns 1.1.1.1 Aap multiple --dns-search flags jodkar multiple search domain specify kar sakte hain: --dns-search example.com --dns-search internal.local Note: DNS server configure karte samay IPv6 addresses (jinmein : ho) aur localhost addresses (jaise 127.0.0.53) ko chhod dein. Timezone aur number/date/time format ko adjust karne ke baare mein adhik vivaran ke liye Timezone section dekhein.

Podman pods aapko ek saajha network namespace mein multiple containers chalane ki anumati dete hain. Yah testing ke liye ya jab aapko duplistatus ko anya containers ke saath chalane ki zaroorat ho to upyogi hai. Saadhaaran pod setup: mkdir -p ~/duplistatus_data # Create the pod podman pod create --name duplistatus-pod --publish 9666:9666/tcp # Create the container in the pod podman create --name duplistatus \ --pod duplistatus-pod \ --user root \ -e TZ=Europe/London \ -e LANG=en_GB \ -v ~/duplistatus_data:/app/data \ ghcr.io/wsj-br/duplistatus:latest # Start the pod podman pod start duplistatus-pod Podman Pods ke liye DNS configure karna​ Pods ka upyog karte samay, DNS configuration pod level par set kiya jaana chahiye, container level par nahi. Apne DNS server aur search domain dhundhne ke liye Option 5 mein bataaye gaye tareeke istemaal karein. DNS configuration ka udaharan: mkdir -p ~/duplistatus_data # Create the pod with DNS configuration podman pod create --name duplistatus-pod \ --publish 9666:9666/tcp \ --dns 100.100.100.100 \ --dns-search example.com # Create the container in the pod podman create --name duplistatus \ --pod duplistatus-pod \ --user root \ -e TZ=Europe/London \ -e LANG=en_GB \ -v ~/duplistatus_data:/app/data \ ghcr.io/wsj-br/duplistatus:latest # Start the pod podman pod start duplistatus-pod Pod ka prabandhan: # Stop the pod (stops all containers in the pod) podman pod stop duplistatus-pod # Start the pod podman pod start duplistatus-pod # Remove the pod and all containers podman pod rm -f duplistatus-pod

Apne Duplicati server ko backup log sandesh duplistatus ko bhejne ke liye configure karein (anivarya). Duplistatus mein pravesh karein – Upyogkarta Margdarshika mein nirdeshon ka paalan karein. Prarambhik backup logs sankalan karein – Backup Logs Ikattha Karein visheshata ka upyog karke aapke sabhi Duplicati server se aitihaasik backup data se database ko aabadi den. Isse pratyek server ki sammaan ke aadhar par backup monitoring antaral bhi swatah hi update ho jaate hain. Server settings configure karein – Sammaan → Server mein server upnaamon aur notes set up karein taaki aapka dashboard adhik soochak ban sake. NTFY settings configure karein – Sammaan → NTFY mein NTFY ke madhyam se suchnaayein sthapit karein. Email settings configure karein – Sammaan → Email mein email suchnaayein sthapit karein. Backup suchnaayein configure karein – Sammaan → Backup Suchnaayein mein prati-backup ya prati-server suchnaayein sthapit karein. Samay kshetra, sankhya format, aur HTTPS jaise aavashyak settings configure karne ke liye nimnalikhit sections dekhein.

Aavedan upayogkarta interface taareekh aur samay brauzar ki sammaan ke anusaar pradarshit honge. Haalanki, logging aur suchnaayein uddeshyon ke liye, aavedan samay kshetro ko format karne ke liye TZ environment variable mein paribhashit maan ka upayog karega. Yadi yah environment variable nirdharit nahin hai, to default maan TZ=Europe/London hai. Note Suchnaayein ke liye bhasha aur locale settings (number aur date formats) ko Sammaan → Templates mein configure kiya ja sakta hai.

Aavedan upayogkarta interface taareekh aur samay brauzar ki sammaan ke anusaar pradarshit honge. Haalanki, logging aur suchnaayein uddeshyon ke liye, aavedan samay kshetro ko format karne ke liye TZ environment variable mein paribhashit maan ka upayog karega. Yadi yah environment variable nirdharit nahin hai, to default maan TZ=Europe/London hai. Udaharan ke liye, São Paulo mein samay kshetra badalne ke liye, duplistatus directory mein compose.yml mein ye lainein jodein: environment: - TZ=America/Sao_Paulo ya command line (Docker ya Podman) mein environment variable pass karein: --env TZ=America/Sao_Paulo
Apne Linux host ke configuration prapt karne ke liye, aap ise execute kar sakte hain: echo TZ=\"$(</etc/timezone)\"
documents.s: Apne Linux Configuration ka Upayog Karna

documents.t: Aap samay kshetron ki soochi yahan paa sakte hain: Wikipedia: List of tz database time zones

Is application ko theek se kaam karne ke liye, aapke har Duplicati server ko duplistatus server ko har backup run ke liye HTTP reports bhejane ke liye configure karna hoga. Apne har Duplicati server par yeh configuration apply karein: Backup result reporting configure karein: Duplicati configuration page par, Settings select karein aur, Default Options section mein, nimnalikhit options shamil karein. Apne server ka naam ya IP pata jahan duplistatus chal raha hai, uske liye 'my.local.server' ko replace karein. Advanced option Value send-http-url http://my.local.server:9666/api/upload send-http-result-output-format Json send-http-log-level Information send-http-max-log-lines 0 Vaikalpik roop se, aap Edit as text par click kar sakte hain aur neeche di gayi lines ko copy kar sakte hain, my.local.server ko apne actual server address se replace karke. --send-http-url=http://my.local.server:9666/api/upload --send-http-result-output-format=Json --send-http-log-level=Information --send-http-max-log-lines=0 Duplicati dwara bheje gaye sandeshon par mahatvapurna tippaniyan: Agar aap --send-http-log-level=Information ko omit karte hain, to duplistatus ko koi log sandesh nahi bheja jayega, kewal aankde. Yeh available versions feature ko kaam karne se rokega. Anushansit configuration --send-http-max-log-lines=0 hai aparimit sandeshon ke liye, kyunki Duplicati ka default 100 sandesh available versions ko log mein prapt karne se rok sakta hai. Agar aap sandeshon ki sankhya ko seemit karte hain, to available backup versions prapt karne ke liye avashyak log sandesh prapt nahi ho sakte hain. Yeh un versions ko us backup run ke liye display hone se rokega. tip duplistatus server ko configure karne ke baad, Backup Logs Ikattha Karein ka upyog karke apne sabhi Duplicati servers ke backup logs ikattha karein. Vaikalpik - Remote UI access allow karein: Agar aap duplistatus dashboard links se seedhe Duplicati web interface access karna chahte hain, to Duplicati's UI mein pravesh karein, Settings select karein, aur remote access allow karein, jisme hostnames ki list shamil ho (ya * ka upyog karein). Agar aap ise skip karte hain, to duplistatus backup reports prapt karta rahega, lekin Duplicati UI ke seedhe links kaam nahi karenge. Jankari Agar aap Duplicati mein remote access enable nahi karte hain, to Duplistatus mein Duplicati UI access karne ke links kaam nahi karenge. Savdhani Kewal tabhi remote access enable karein jab aapka Duplicati server ek surakshit network dwara surakshit ho (jaise, VPN, private LAN, ya firewall rules). Bina uchit suraksha upaayon ke Duplicati interface ko public Internet par expose karne se anadhikrit access ho sakta hai. Apne servers ko apne local network ke bahar se surakshit roop se access karne ke liye Tailscale, Headscale, NetBird, ZeroTier, Nebula, Twingate, Pritunl, Cloudflare Access, Wireguard ya aise hi solutions ka upyog karne ki anushansa ki jati hai.

Yah application configuration ke liye nimnalikhit paryavaran charon ka samarthan karta hai: Char (Variable) Vivaran (Description) Default (Mool roop se) PORT Mukhya web application ke liye Port 9666 CRON_PORT Cron service (scheduling) ke liye Port. Agar nirdharit nahin hai, to PORT + 1 ka upyog karega 9667 NODE_ENV Node.js paryavaran (development ya production) production NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED Next.js telemetry ko band karein 1 TZ Application ke liye samay kshetra (Timezone) Europe/London PWD_ENFORCE Password complexity avashyaktaon (bade akshar, chhote akshar, sankhya) ko band karne ke liye false par set karein. Lagu (poorn maan'yakaran) PWD_MIN_LEN Password ki newntam lambai aksharon mein (hamesha lagu) 8

Utpadan pariyon ke lie, yah salaah di jaati hai ki duplistatus ko HTTPS par reverse proxy ka upayog karke serve karen. Yah vibhaag lokapriy reverse proxy samadhaanon ke lie configuration udaharanon ko prastut karta hai.

Nginx ek lokapriy web server hai jo reverse proxy ke roop mein kaam kar sakta hai, aur Certbot Let's Encrypt se muft SSL pramaanapatr pradaan karta hai. Poorvavartitaen: Aapke server ko sanket karta hua domain naam Aapke pranali par Nginx sthaapit Aapke operating system ke lie Certbot sthaapit Charan 1: Nginx aur Certbot sthaapit karen Ubuntu/Debian ke lie: sudo apt update sudo apt install nginx certbot python3-certbot-nginx Charan 2: Nginx configuration banaen /etc/nginx/sites-available/duplistatus banaen: server { listen 80; server_name your-domain.com; location / { proxy_pass http://localhost:9666; proxy_set_header Host $host; proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr; proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for; proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme; } } Charan 3: Site sakriy karen aur SSL pramaanapatr praapt karen # Enable the site sudo ln -s /etc/nginx/sites-available/duplistatus /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/ sudo nginx -t sudo systemctl reload nginx # Obtain SSL certificate sudo certbot --nginx -d your-domain.com Certbot svachaalit roop se aapke Nginx configuration ko SSL settingon ko shaamil karne aur HTTP ko HTTPS par redirect karne ke lie update karega. Dastaavez: Nginx Dastaavezeekaran Certbot Dastaavezeekaran Let's Encrypt Dastaavezeekaran
documents.s: Vikalp 1: Certbot (Let's Encrypt) ke saath Nginx

documents.t: Caddy ek aadhunik web server hai jismein svachaalit HTTPS hai jo SSL pramaanapatr prabandhan ko saral banaata hai. Poorvavartitaen: Aapke server ko sanket karta hua domain naam Aapke pranali par Caddy sthaapit Charan 1: Caddy sthaapit karen Aapke operating system ke lie aadhikaarik sthaapana maargadarshika ka anupalan karen. Charan 2: Caddyfile banayein Neeche diye gaye content ke saath ek Caddyfile banayein: your-domain.com { reverse_proxy localhost:9666 } Charan 3: Caddy chalayein sudo caddy run --config Caddyfile Ya ise system service ke roop mein istemaal karein: sudo caddy start --config Caddyfile Caddy svatah hi Let's Encrypt se SSL certificate prapt aur manage karega. Dastaavez: Caddy Dastaavez Caddy Reverse Proxy Guide

--send-http-url=https://your-domain.com/api/upload IMPORTANT HTTPS setup karne ke baad, apne Duplicati server configuration ko HTTPS URL ka istemaal karne ke liye update karna yaad rakhein: tip your-domain.com ko apne vastavik domain naam se badlein Sunishchit karein ki aapke domain ka DNS A record aapke server ke IP pata ki taraf ishara karta hai Dono solutions svatah hi SSL certificate renew karenge Firewall setup karne par vichar karein taaki kewal HTTP/HTTPS traffic ki anumati ho
Duplistatus - Ekal Dashboard se Multiple Duplicati's Server Monitor Karen

Turant Setup: Saral containerised deployment, Docker Hub aur GitHub par uplabdh images ke saath. Ekikrit Dashboard: Sabhi serveron ke liye backup sthiti, itihas, aur vivaran ek hi sthan par dekhen. Backup Monitoring: Overdue scheduled backups ke liye swachalit jaanch aur alert. Data Visualisation & Logs: Duplicati serveron se interactive charts aur swachalit log collection. Suchnaayein & Alerts: Backup alerts ke liye NTFY aur SMTP email support sammilit, jismein overdue backup suchnaayein shamil hain. Upyogkarta Access Control & Suraksha: Role-based access control (Admin/User roles) ke saath surakshit authentication pranali, configure kiye ja sakne wale password policy, account lockout protection, aur comprehensive upyogkarta prabandhan. Audit Logging: Advanced filtering, export capabilities, aur configurable retention periods ke saath sabhi pranali parivartanon aur upyogkarta kriyaon ka poora audit trail. Application Logs Viewer: Web interface se seedhe application logs ko dekhne, khojne, aur export karne ke liye Admin-only interface, real-time monitoring capabilities ke saath. Multi-Bhaasha Support: Interface aur documentation English, French, German, Spanish, Brazilian Portuguese, Hindi (Roman) aur Simplified Chinese mein upalabdh hain.

Application ko Docker, Portainer Stacks, ya Podman ka upyog karke deploy kiya ja sakta hai. Sthapana Guide mein vivaran dekhen. Yadi aap kisi purane sanskaran se upgrade kar rahe hain, to aapka database upgrade prakriya ke dauran swachalit roop se naye schema mein migrate ho jayega. Podman ka upyog karte samay (ya to standalone container ke roop mein ya pod ke andar), aur yadi aapko custom DNS settings ki avashyakta hai (jaise ki Tailscale MagicDNS, corporate networks, ya anya custom DNS configurations ke liye), to aap manually dns server aur search domains nirdharit kar sakte hain. Adhik vivaran ke liye sthapana guide dekhen.

Ek baar jab aapka duplistatus server chal raha ho, to aapko apne Duplicati serveron ko configure karne ki avashyakta hogi taki backup logs duplistatus ko bheje ja saken, jaisa ki Sthapana Guide ke Duplicati Configuration section mein bataya gaya hai. Is configuration ke bina, dashboard ko aapke Duplicati serveron se backup data prapt nahi hoga.
Prarambhik setup, visheshta configuration, aur troubleshooting sahit duplistatus ko configure aur upyog karne ke baare mein vishad nirdeshon ke liye Upyogkarta Guide dekhen.
Uplabdh endpoints, request/response formats, aur udaharanon ke baare mein vivaran ke liye API Endpoints Documentation dekhen.

Code download karne, badalne, ya chalane ke liye instructions ke vaaste, Vikas Setup dekhen. Yah project mukhya roop se AI ki madad se banaya gaya tha. Kaise, yah jaanane ke liye AI tools ka upyog karke yah application kaise banaya dekhen.

Sarvapratham, Duplicati banane ke liye Kenneth Skovhede ka dhanyavaad—yah adbhut backup tool. Sabhi yogdaanakartaon ka bhi dhanyavaad. 💙 Yadi aap Duplicati ko upyogi paate hain, to kripya developer ka samarthan karne par vichar karen. Unke website ya GitHub page par adhik vivaran uplabdh hain. Duplicati SVG icon https://dashboardicons.com/icons/duplicati se ntfy SVG icon https://dashboardicons.com/icons/ntfy se GitHub SVG icon https://github.com/logos se Note Sabhi product naam, logos aur trademarks unke respective owners ki sampatti hain. Icons aur naam keval pehchaan ke uddeshya se istemaal kiye jaate hain aur samarthan ka sanket nahin dete hain.

Yah dastavez duplistatus ke vibhinn sanskaranon mein bahari API endpoints mein todne wale badlavon ki rooprekha deta hai. Bahari API endpoints anya anupryogon aur integrations (udaharan ke liye, Homepage integration) dwara upyog ke liye dizain kiye gaye hain.

Yah dastavez bahari API endpoints mein todne wale badlavon ko kavar karta hai jo integrations, scripts, aur in endpoints ka upyog karne wale anupryogon ko prabhavit karte hain. Web interface dwara upyog kiye jane wale antarik API endpoints ke liye, badlav svatah kiye jate hain aur unhein manaviy roop se update karne ki avashyakta nahin hoti hai. Note Bahari API endpoints ko jab bhi sambhav ho, bahari anukoolata ke liye banaye rakha jata hai. Todne wale badlav kewal tab hi pesh kiye jate hain jab consistency, suraksha, ya karyakshamata sudhar ke liye avashyak ho.

Bahari API Endpoints mein koi todne wala badlav nahin Sanskaran 0.9.x authentication pesh karta hai aur sabhi upyogkartaon ko pravesh karne ki avashyakta hai. Jab sanskaran 0.8.x se upgrade kar rahe hon: Authentication avashyak: Sabhi pages aur antarik API endpoints ko ab authentication ki avashyakta hai Default Admin Account: Ek default admin account svatah banaya jata hai: Username: admin Password: Duplistatus09 (pahle pravesh par badla jana chahiye) Session Validity: Sabhi maujooda sessions ko avaidh kar diya gaya hai Bahari API Access: Bahari API endpoints (/api/summary, /api/lastbackup, /api/lastbackups, /api/upload) integrations aur Duplicati ke saath anukoolata ke liye apramanit rahte hain

Bahari API Endpoints mein koi todne wala badlav nahin Sanskaran 0.8.x mein bahari API endpoints mein koi breaking changes nahi hain. Nimnalikhit endpoints avam parivartit hain: /api/summary - Response structure avam parivartit /api/lastbackup/{serverId} - Response structure avam parivartit /api/lastbackups/{serverId} - Response structure avam parivartit /api/upload - Request/response format avam parivartit Suraksha Badhotari​ Jabki bahari API endpoints mein koi breaking changes nahi kiye gaye hain, sanskaran 0.8.x mein suraksha badhotariyan shamil hain: CSRF Suraksha: CSRF token validation rajya-badalne wale API anurodhon ke liye lagu kiya gaya hai, lekin bahari APIs avam anukoolit hain Password Suraksha: Password endpoints suraksha ke liye kewal upyogkarta interface tak seemit hain Note Ye suraksha badhotariyan backup data padhne ke liye istemal hone wale bahari API endpoints ko prabhavit nahi karti hain. Yadi aapke paas antarik endpoints ka istemal karne wali anukoolit scripts hain, to unhein CSRF token handling ki avashyakta ho sakti hai.

Sanskaran 0.7.x mein bahari API endpoints mein kai breaking changes hain jinhein bahari integrations mein updates ki avashyakta hai. Breaking Changes​ Kshetra ka naam badalna​ totalMachines → totalServers /api/summary endpoint mein machine → server API response objects mein backup_types_count → backup_jobs_count /api/lastbackups/{serverId} endpoint mein Endpoint path mein badlav​ Sabhi API endpoints jo pehle /api/machines/... ka istemal karte the ab /api/servers/... ka istemal karte hain Parameter ke naam machine_id se badalkar server_id kar diye gaye hain (URL encoding abhi bhi dono ke saath kaam karta hai) Response structure mein badlav​ Ekroopata ke liye kai endpoints ki response structure ko update kiya gaya hai: /api/summary​ 0.6.x aur usse pehle: { "totalMachines": 3, "totalBackupsRuns": 9, "totalBackups": 9, "totalUploadedSize": 2397229507, "totalStorageUsed": 43346796938, "totalBackupSize": 126089687807, "overdueBackupsCount": 2, "secondsSinceLastBackup": 7200 } 0.7.x+ ke baad: { "totalServers": 3, // Changed from "totalMachines" "totalBackupsRuns": 9, "totalBackups": 9, "totalUploadedSize": 2397229507, "totalStorageUsed": 43346796938, "totalBackupSize": 126089687807, "overdueBackupsCount": 2, "secondsSinceLastBackup": 7200 } /api/lastbackup/{serverId}​ 0.6.x aur usse pehle: { "machine": { // Changed to "server" "id": "unique-server-id", "name": "Server Name", "backup_name": "Backup Name", "backup_id": "backup-id", "created_at": "2024-03-20T10:00:00Z" }, "latest_backup": { // ... backup details }, "status": 200 } 0.7.x+ ke baad: { "server": { // Changed from "machine" "id": "unique-server-id", "name": "Server Name", "backup_name": "Backup Name", "backup_id": "backup-id", "created_at": "2024-03-20T10:00:00Z" }, "latest_backup": { // ... backup details }, "status": 200 } /api/lastbackups/{serverId}​ 0.6.x aur usse pehle: { "machine": { // Changed to "server" "id": "unique-server-id", "name": "Server Name", "backup_name": "Default Backup", "backup_id": "backup-id", "created_at": "2024-03-20T10:00:00Z" }, "latest_backups": [ // ... backup array ], "backup_types_count": 2, // Changed to "backup_jobs_count" "backup_names": ["Files", "Databases"], "status": 200 } 0.7.x+ ke baad: { "server": { // Changed from "machine" "id": "unique-server-id", "name": "Server Name", "backup_name": "Default Backup", "backup_id": "backup-id", "created_at": "2024-03-20T10:00:00Z" }, "latest_backups": [ // ... backup array ], "backup_jobs_count": 2, // Changed from "backup_types_count" "backup_names": ["Files", "Databases"], "status": 200 }

Agar aap 0.7.x se pehle ke version se upgrade kar rahe hain, to in steps ko follow karen: Field References ko Update Karen: Purane field names ke sabhi references ko naye se badal den totalMachines → totalServers backup_types_count → backup_jobs_count Object Keys ko Update Karen: Response parsing mein machine ko server mein badalen Kisi bhi code ko update karen jo response.machine ko access karta hai response.server ke liye Endpoint Paths ko Update Karen: /api/machines/... ka istemal karne wale kisi bhi endpoint ko /api/servers/... mein badalen Note: Parameters ab bhi purane identifiers ko accept kar sakte hain; paths ko update kiya jana chahiye Integration ka Parikshan Karen: Verify karen ki aapki integration naye API structure ke saath kaam karti hai Un sabhi endpoints ka parikshan karen jinka istemal aapka application karta hai Verify karen ki response parsing naye field names ko sahi dhang se handle karta hai Documentation ko Update Karen: Purane API ka reference dene wale kisi bhi internal documentation ko update karen API examples aur field name references ko update karen

Version 1.2.1: 1.1.x API structure ke saath poori tarah backward compatible Version 1.1.x: 1.0.x API structure ke saath poori tarah backward compatible Version 1.0.x: 0.9.x API structure ke saath poori tarah backward compatible Version 0.9.x: 0.8.x API structure ke saath poori tarah backward compatible Version 0.8.x: 0.7.x API structure ke saath poori tarah backward compatible Version 0.7.x: 0.7.x se pehle ke versions ke saath backward compatible nahin hai Purane field names kaam nahin karenge Purane endpoint paths kaam nahin karenge

0.7.x se pehle ke versions ke purane field names supported nahin hain 0.7.x se pehle ke versions ke purane endpoint paths supported nahin hain Future versions vartaman API structure ko maintain karenge jab tak ki breaking changes zaroori na hon

Neeche diye gaye external API endpoints backward compatibility ke liye maintain kiye gaye hain aur unauthenticated hain: Endpoint Method Description Breaking Changes /api/summary GET Backup operations ka samagra saransh 0.7.x: totalMachines → totalServers /api/lastbackup/{serverId} GET Server ke liye latest backup 0.7.x: machine → server /api/lastbackups/{serverId} GET Sabhi backup jobs ke liye latest backups 0.7.x: machine → server, backup_types_count → backup_jobs_count /api/upload POST Duplicati se backup data upload karein Koi breaking changes nahi

Agar aapko apna integration update karne mein sahayata chahiye: API Reference: Vartaman endpoint documentation ke liye API Reference ki Janch karein External APIs: Vistrit endpoint documentation ke liye External APIs dekhein Migration Guide: Samanya migration jaankari ke liye Migration Guide ki samiksha karein Release Notes: Adhik sandarbh ke liye version-specific Release Notes ki samiksha karein Support: Support ke liye GitHub par ek issue kholen

Yah guide batati hai ki duplistatus ke sanskaranon ke beech kaise upgrade karein. Migration swachalit hain—jab aap naya sanskaran shuru karte hain to database schema khud update ho jaata hai. Manual kadam sirf tabhi avashyak hain jab aapne notification templates ko customize kiya ho (sanskaran 0.8.x ne template variables badle hain) ya external API integrations ko update karne ki avashyakta ho (sanskaran 0.7.x ne API field names badle hain, sanskaran 0.9.x ko authentication ki avashyakta hai).

duplistatus upgrade karte samay aapke database schema ko swachalit roop se migrate karta hai. Pranali: Parivartanon ko karne se pehle aapke database ka backup banata hai Database schema ko naveentam sanskaran tak update karta hai Sabhi vidyamaan data (servers, backups, configuration) ko sanrakshit rakhta hai Migration ke safaltapoorvak poora hone ki pushti karta hai

Naye sanskaran mein upgrade karne se pehle, aapke database ka backup banana anushansit hai. Yah sunishchit karta hai ki yadi migration prakriya ke dauraan kuch galat ho jaaye to aap apne data ko restore kar sakte hain.
documents.s: Migration Se Pehle Aapke Database Ka Backup Lena

documents.t: Antar-nirmit database backup function ka upyog karein: Web interface mein Sammaan → Database Maintenance par jaayein Database Backup section mein, ek backup format chunein: Database File (.db): Binary format - sabse tez backup, sabhi database structure ko bilkul sanrakshit rakhta hai SQL Dump (.sql): Text format - manav-pathneeya SQL statements Download Backup par click karein Backup file aapke computer par timestamped filename ke saath download ho jayegi Adhik vivaran ke liye, Database Maintenance dastavez par jaayein.
documents.s: Yadi Aap Sanskaran 1.2.1 Ya Uske Baad Chalate Hain

documents.t: Backup​ Aage badhne se pehle aapko database ka manual backup lena hoga. Database file container ke andar /app/data/backups.db par sthit hai. Linux Upyogkartaon Ke Liye​ Yadi aap Linux par hain, to helper containers shuru karne ki chinta na karein. Aap running container se seedhe database ko apne host par nikalne ke liye native cp command ka upyog kar sakte hain. Docker Ya Podman Ka Upyog Karna:​ # Replace 'duplistatus' with your actual container name if different docker cp duplistatus:/app/data/backups.db ./duplistatus-backup-$(date +%Y%m%d).db (Podman ka upyog karte samay, upar diye gaye command mein docker ko podman se badal dein.) Windows Upyogkartaon Ke Liye​ Yadi aap Windows par Docker Desktop chalate hain, to command line ka upyog kiye bina ise handle karne ke liye aapke paas do saral tareeke hain: Vikalp A: Docker Desktop Ka Upyog Karein (Sabse Aasan)​ Docker Desktop Dashboard kholein. Containers tab par jaayein aur apne duplistatus container par click karein. Files tab par click karein. /app/data/ par jaayen. backups.db par right-click karein aur ise apne Windows folder mein download karne ke liye Save as... chunein. Vikalp B: PowerShell ka upyog karein​ Yadi aap terminal pasand karte hain, to aap file ko apne Desktop par copy karne ke liye PowerShell ka upyog kar sakte hain: docker cp duplistatus:/app/data/backups.db $HOME\Desktop\duplistatus-backup.db Yadi aap Bind Mounts ka upyog karte hain​ Yadi aapne shuru mein bind mount ka upyog karke apna container set kiya tha (udaharan ke liye, aapne /opt/duplistatus jaise local folder ko container mein map kiya), to aapko bilkul bhi Docker commands ki zaroorat nahin hai. Bas apne file manager ka upyog karke file copy karein: Linux: cp /path/to/your/folder/backups.db ~/backups.db Windows: Setup ke dauraan aapne jo folder designate kiya tha, us folder se File Explorer mein file ko seedhe copy karein. Apne Data ko Restore karna​ Yadi aapko apne database ko pichhle backup se restore karne ki zaroorat hai, to apne operating system ke aadhar par neeche diye gaye steps follow karein. IMPORTANT Database restore karne se pehle container ko stop karein taaki file corruption se bacha ja sake. Linux Upyogkartaon ke liye​ Restore karne ka sabse aasan tareeka backup file ko container ke internal storage path mein "push" karna hai. Docker ya Podman ka upyog karna:​ # stop the container docker stop duplistatus # Replace 'duplistatus-backup.db' with your actual backup filename docker cp ./duplistatus-backup.db duplistatus:/app/data/backups.db # Restart the container docker start duplistatus Windows Upyogkartaon ke liye​ Yadi aap Docker Desktop ka upyog kar rahe hain, to aap GUI ya PowerShell ke madhyam se restore kar sakte hain. Vikalp A: Docker Desktop (GUI) ka upyog karna​ Sunishchit karein ki duplistatus container chal raha hai (Docker Desktop ko GUI ke madhyam se file upload karne ke liye container ka sakriya hona zaroori hai). Apne container settings mein Files tab par jaayen. /app/data/ par jaayen. Maujooda backups.db par right-click karein aur Delete chunein. Import button par click karein (ya folder area mein right-click karein) aur apne computer se apna backup file chunein. Import ki gayi file ka naam badalkar bilkul backups.db rakhein yadi uske naam mein timestamp ho. Container ko restart karein. Vikalp B: PowerShell ka upyog karna​ # Copy the file from your Desktop back into the container docker cp $HOME\Desktop\duplistatus-backup.db duplistatus:/app/data/backups.db # Restart the container docker start duplistatus Yadi aap Bind Mounts ka upyog karte hain​ Yadi aap container mein map ki gayi local folder ka upyog kar rahe hain, to aapko kisi vishesh command ki zaroorat nahin hai. Container ko stop karein. Apni backup file ko manually apne mapped folder (udaharan ke liye, /opt/duplistatus ya C:\duplistatus_data) mein copy karein. Sunishchit karein ki file ka naam bilkul backups.db hai. Container ko start karein. docker logs <container-name> Note Yadi aap database ko manually restore karte hain, to aapko permission errors ka saamna karna pad sakta hai. Container logs check karein aur yadi zaroori ho to permissions adjust karein. Adhik jaankari ke liye neeche Troubleshooting section dekhein.
documents.s: Yadi Aap Sanskaran 1.2.1 Se Pehle Chalate Hain

documents.t: Jab aap naya sanskaran start karte hain, to migrations swachalit roop se chalte hain: Backup Banana: Aapke data directory mein ek timestamped backup banaya jaata hai Schema Update: Database tables aur fields zaroorat ke anusar update kiye jaate hain Data Migration: Sabhi maujooda data ko surakshit rakha jaata hai aur migrate kiya jaata hai Satyapan: Migration ki safalta log ki jaati hai

Migration ki pragati ki nigrani karne ke liye Docker logs check karein: Sandeshon ko dekhein jaise: "Found X pending migrations" "Running consolidated migration X.0..." "Migration X.0 completed successfully" "Database backup created: /path/to/backups-copy-YYYY-MM-DDTHH-MM-SS.db" "All migrations completed successfully"

warning Authentication ab zaroori hai. Sabhi upyogkartaon ko upgrade ke baad pravesh karna hoga. Kya Swachalit roop se badalta hai​ Database schema v3.1 se v4.0 mein migrate hota hai Nayi tables banayi gayi hain: users, sessions, audit_log Default Admin account swachalit roop se banaya jaata hai Sabhi maujooda sessions invalidate kiye gaye hain Aapko Kya Karna Hoga​ Default admin credentials ke saath Pravesh karein: Username: admin Password: Duplistatus09 Poochhe jaane par password badlein (pehla pravesh karne par zaroori) Anya upyogkarta ke liye upyogkarta accounts banayein (Sammaan → Upyogkarta) Authentication shamil karne ke liye bahari API integrations update karein (dekhein Backward-incompatible API changes) Yadi avashyak ho to Audit Log Retention configure karein (Sammaan → Audit log) Yadi Aap Lock Ho Gaye Hain​ Admin recovery tool ka upyog karein: docker exec -it duplistatus /app/admin-recovery admin NewPassword123 Vivaran ke liye Admin Recovery Guide dekhein.
documents.s: Sanskaran 0.9.x ya Uske Baad Mein Upgrade karna (Schema v4.0)

documents.t: Kya Swatah Badalta Hai​ Database schema v3.1 mein update kiya gaya Encryption ke liye Master key generate ki gayi (.duplistatus.key mein stored) Sessions invalidate ki gayi (naye CSRF-protected sessions banaye gaye) Naye system ka upyog karke passwords encrypt kiye gaye Aapko Kya Karna Hoga​ Yadi aapne notification templates customize kiye hain to unhein update karein: {backup_interval_value} aur {backup_interval_type} ko {backup_interval} se badlein Default templates swatah update ho jate hain Suraksha Suchnaayein​ Sunishchit karein ki .duplistatus.key file ka backup liya gaya hai (0400 permissions hain) Sessions 24 ghante baad expire ho jati hain

Kya Swatah Badalta Hai​ machines table ka naam badalkar servers kar diya gaya machine_id fields ka naam badalkar server_id kar diya gaya Naye fields jode gaye: alias, notes, created_at, updated_at Aapko Kya Karna Hoga​ Bahari API integrations update karein: /api/summary mein totalMachines → totalServers badlein API response objects mein machine → server badlein /api/lastbackups/{serverId} mein backup_types_count → backup_jobs_count badlein Endpoint paths ko /api/machines/... se /api/servers/... mein update karein Notification templates update karein: {machine_name} ko {server_name} se badlein Vistrit API migration steps ke liye Backward-incompatible API changes dekhein.

Upgrade karne ke baad, jaanch karein: Sabhi server dashboard mein sahi dikh rahe hain Backup Itihas poora aur accessible hai Suchnaayein kaam kar rahi hain (NTFY/email ka parikshan karein) Bahari API integrations kaam kar rahe hain (yadi lagu ho) Sammaan accessible aur sahi hain Backup Monitoring sahi kaam kar raha hai Safaltapoorvak login kiya (0.9.x+) Default Admin Password badla (0.9.x+) Anya upyogkartaon ke liye user accounts banaye (0.9.x+) Authentication ke saath bahari API integrations update kiye (0.9.x+)

Disk space ki jaanch karein (backup ke liye space chahiye) Data directory par write permissions verify karein Vishesh trutiyon ke liye container logs review karein Yadi zaroorat ho to backup se restore karein (Rollback neeche dekhein)
Backup banne ki verify karein (data directory check karein) Backup banane ke sandeshon ke liye container logs review karein Database file integrity check karein

Default Admin account maujood hone ki verify karein (logs check karein) Default credentials try karein: admin / Duplistatus09 Lockout hone par admin recovery tool ka upyog karein Database mein users table maujood hone ki verify karein

Endpoint updates ke liye Backward-incompatible API changes review karein Naye field names ke saath bahari integrations update karein API requests mein authentication jodein (0.9.x+) Migration ke baad API endpoints ka parikshan karein
.duplistatus.key file accessible hone ki sunishchit karein File permissions 0400 hone ki verify karein Key generation trutiyon ke liye container logs check karein

Yadi aap Podman ka upyog kar rahe hain aur upgrade ke baad network connectivity samasyao ka anubhav kar rahe hain, to aapko apne container ke liye DNS settings configure karne ki zaroorat ho sakti hai. Vivaran ke liye installation guide mein DNS configuration section dekhein.

Yadi aapko pichle sanskaran mein rollback karne ki zaroorat hai: Container band karein: docker stop <container-name> (ya podman stop <container-name>) Apna backup dhoondhein: Yadi aapne web interface (sanskaran 1.2.1+) ka upyog karke backup banaya hai, to us download kiye gaye backup file ka upyog karein Yadi aapne manual volume backup banaya hai, to pehle use extract karein Automatic migration backups data directory mein sthit hain (timestamped .db files) Database restore karein: Web interface backups ke liye (sanskaran 1.2.1+): Settings → Database Maintenance mein restore function ka upyog karein (dekhein Database Maintenance) Manual backups ke liye: Apni data directory/volume mein backups.db ko backup file se badlein Pichle image sanskaran ka upyog karein: Pichle container image ko pull aur run karein Container start karein: Pichle sanskaran ke saath start karein warning Agar naya schema purane version ke saath asangat ho to rollback karne se data ka nuksan ho sakta hai. Rollback ka prayas karne se pehle hamesha ek haal ka backup sunishchit karein.

Agar restore ya rollback ke baad application shuru nahi hota hai ya aapka data dikhai nahi deta hai, to nimnalikhit aam samasyaon ki jaanch karein: 1. Database File Permissions (Linux/Podman)​ Agar aapne root upyogkarta ke roop mein file ko restore kiya hai, to container ke andar application ke paas use padhne ya likhne ki anumati nahi ho sakti hai. Lakshan: Logs mein "Permission Denied" ya "Read-only database." dikhata hai. Samadhan: File ki anumatiyon ko container ke andar reset karein taaki yeh sunishchit ho sake ki yeh pahunch yogya hai. # Set ownership (usually UID 1000 or the app user) docker exec -u 0 duplistatus chown 1000:1000 /app/data/backups.db # Set read/write permissions docker exec -u 0 duplistatus chmod 664 /app/data/backups.db 2. Galat Filename​ Application vishesh roop se backups.db naam ki file dhoondhta hai. Lakshan: Application shuru hota hai lekin "khali" dikhta hai (jaise naya install ho). Samadhan: /app/data/ directory ki jaanch karein. Agar aapki file ka naam duplistatus-backup-2024.db hai ya uska .sqlite extension hai, to app use nazarandaaz kar dega. Ise backups.db naam dene ke liye mv command ya Docker Desktop GUI ka upyog karein. 3. Container Restart Nahi Kiya Gaya​ Kuch systems par, container chalne ke dauran docker cp ka upyog karne se application ka database se connection turant "refresh" nahi ho sakta hai. Samadhan: Restore ke baad hamesha poora restart karein: docker restart duplistatus 4. Database Version Mismatch​ Agar aap duplistatus ke bahut naye version ka backup purane version mein restore kar rahe hain, to database schema asangat ho sakta hai. Samadhan: Hamesha sunishchit karein ki aap backup banane wale duplistatus image ke saman (ya naye) version ko chala rahe hain. Apne version ki jaanch isse karein: docker inspect duplistatus --format '{{.Config.Image}}'
documents.s: Apne Restore / Rollback mein samasyaon ka nivaran

documents.t: Application Version Schema Version Mukhya Badlav 0.6.x aur pehle v1.0 Shuruaati schema 0.7.x v2.0, v3.0 Configurations jodi gayi, machines ka naam badalkar servers kiya gaya 0.8.x v3.1 Backup fields badhaye gaye, encryption support 0.9.x, 1.0.x, 1.1.x, 1.2.x, 1.3.x v4.0 Upyogkarta access control, authentication, audit logging

Dastavezikaran: Upyogkarta Margdarshak API Sandarbh: API Dastavezikaran API Parivartan: Pashchagami-asangat API parivartan Release Notes: Vistrit parivartanon ke liye sanskaran-vishesh release notes ki jaanch karein Samuday: GitHub Charcha Samasyaen: GitHub Samasyaen

Sanskaran 0.7.x ek pramukh release hai jo database schema, API structure, aur user interface mein mahatvapurna sudhaar laati hai. Is sanskaran mein breaking changes shaamil hain jinhein bahari integrations ko update karne ki zaroorat hai.

Table Renaming: machines table ka naam badalkar servers kar diya gaya hai New Fields: alias, notes, created_at, aur updated_at fields jode gaye hain API Response Changes: Ekroopata ke liye field names update kiye gaye hain

Field Renaming: totalMachines → totalServers Object Renaming: API responses mein machine → server Field Renaming: backup_types_count → backupJobsCount warning API ka istemaal karne wali bahari integrations ko sanskaran 0.7.x ke saath kaam karne ke liye update kiya jaana chahiye. Vivaran ke liye Backward-incompatible API changes guide dekhein.

Server Aliases: Servers ko anukool, yaad rakhne yogya naam dein Server Notes: Vivaran aur atirikt jaankari jodein Improved Status Tracking: Behtar server stithi monitoring Enhanced Server Details: Adhik vyapak server jaankari

Consistent Response Format: Standardised API response structure Better Error Handling: Sudhare hue error sandesh aur codes Enhanced Documentation: Behtar API documentation New Endpoints: Behtar integration ke liye atirikt API endpoints

Better Performance: Optimised database queries aur indexing Data Integrity: Enhanced data validation aur constraints Migration System: Automated database migration system Backup System: Sudhara hua database backup aur restore

Modern Design: Behtar visual design ke saath updated UI Responsive Layout: Behtar mobile aur tablet support Improved Navigation: Enhanced navigation aur user experience Better Charts: Sudhari hui chart visualisation aur interactivity

Enhanced Templates: Behtar notification sandesh templates Improved Delivery: Adhik vishwasniya notification delivery Better Error Handling: Notifications ke liye sudhara hua error handling Enhanced Logging: Notification debugging ke liye behtar logging
Faster Queries: Optimised database queries Better Caching: Sudhare hue caching mechanisms Reduced Memory Usage: Behtar memory management Faster API Responses: Sudhare hue API response times

Kuch kam mamlon mein database corruption ki samasyaon ko theek kiya gaya Upgrades ke dauran migration ki samasyaon ko hal kiya gaya Vishesh paristhitiyon mein data nuksan ki samasyaon ko theek kiya gaya Database backup aur restore prakriyaon mein sudhar kiya gaya
API response mein asangatiyon ko theek kiya gaya Authentication ki samasyaon ko hal kiya gaya Data validation ki samasyaon ko theek kiya gaya Truti handling aur sandeshon mein sudhar kiya gaya
Dashboard loading ki samasyaon ko theek kiya gaya Chart rendering ki samasyaon ko hal kiya gaya Mobile layout ki samasyaon ko theek kiya gaya Truti sandesh display mein sudhar kiya gaya
Sandesh delivery mein vifaltaon ko theek kiya gaya Email configuration ki samasyaon ko hal kiya gaya NTFY integration ki samasyaon ko theek kiya gaya Sandesh template rendering mein sudhar kiya gaya

0.6.x se 0.7.x tak migration swachalit roop se hoti hai: Backup Banaya Jana: Swachalit database backup banaya jata hai Schema Update: Database schema swachalit roop se update kiya jata hai Data Migration: Maujooda data surakshit rakha jata hai aur migrate kiya jata hai Pushti: Migration ki pushti ki jati hai aur log kiya jata hai

Bahari Integrations Update Karen: API ka upyog karne wale kisi bhi bahari tool ko update karen Karyakshamata ka Parikshan Karen: Sabhi features sahi se kaam kar rahe hain, iski pushti karen Documentation Update Karen: Kisi bhi anukoolit documentation ko update karen

# Server management servers: defaultAlias: true showNotes: true sortBy: "name" # name, status, lastBackup # API settings api: version: "1.0" rateLimit: 100 timeout: 30000 # Database settings database: backupRetention: 7 autoVacuum: true optimizeInterval: 24
machines configuration (iske bajay servers ka upyog karen) Purane API field naam (naye field naam ka upyog karen)
Docker Hub: wsjbr/duplistatus:0.7.x GitHub Container Registry: ghcr.io/wsj-br/duplistatus:0.7.x Latest Tag: wsjbr/duplistatus:latest
Alpine: 52MB Debian: 85MB Multi-arch: ARM64 aur AMD64 ke liye support
services: duplistatus: image: wsjbr/duplistatus:0.7.x container_name: duplistatus restart: unless-stopped ports: - "9666:9666" volumes: - duplistatus_data:/app/data environment: - TZ=UTC
docker run -d \ --name duplistatus \ --restart unless-stopped \ -p 9666:9666 \ -v duplistatus_data:/app/data \ wsjbr/duplistatus:0.7.x

Apne data ka backup lein (upgrade ke dauraan swachalit backup banaya jaata hai) Docker image update karein: docker pull wsjbr/duplistatus:0.7.x Container ko restart karein: docker-compose down && docker-compose up -d Logs ki nigrani karein: docker logs -f duplistatus Integrations update karein: API ka upyog karne wale kisi bhi bahari upkaran ko update karein Upgrade ki pushti karein: Jaanch karein ki sabhi features sahi dhang se kaam kar rahe hain
Pehle 0.6.x mein upgrade karein (yadi uplabdh ho) Phir upar diye gaye steps ka upyog karke 0.7.x mein upgrade karein

Bade Databases: Bade databases ke liye migration mein adhik samay lag sakta hai Disk Space: Migration backup ke liye paryapt disk space sunishchit karein Permissions: Database access ke liye file permissions ki jaanch karein
Bahari Upkaran: API ka upyog karne wale bahari upkaranon ko updates ki avashyakta hai Field Names: Kuch field names badal gaye hain Response Format: Kuch response formats badal gaye hain

Migration: Migration ke liye paryapt disk space aur samay sunishchit karein API: Naye API format ka upyog karne ke liye bahari integrations ko update karein Parikshan: Upgrade ke baad sabhi karyakshamta ka parikshan karein

Sanskaran 0.8.x ek mahatvapurna update hai jo mahatvapurna suraksha badhotari, behtar server prabandhan kshamataayein, aur SMTP email support ke saath ek vyapak suchana pranali pesh karta hai. Yah release suraksha ko majboot karne, upyogkarta anubhav ko badhane, aur adhik flexible backup monitoring vikalp pradaan karne par kendrit hai.

Automatic server URL aur password persistence backup collect karte samay Upyogkarta URL aur password do tareekon se update kar sakte hain: Updated values ke saath backup dobara collect karna Sammaan → Server Sammaan mein settings modify karna

Naya Backup monitoring configuration tab Duplicati server-compatible interval settings ke saath Custom intervals ke liye support (jaise, "1D12h") Backup log collection ke dauraan Duplicati configuration se automatic overdue interval updates Sifarish ki jaati hai: Duplicati server mein backup job intervals badalne ke baad collection run karein taaki duplistatus configuration sync ho sake Suchana templates ab {backup_interval} ka istemaal karte hain {backup_interval_value} aur {backup_interval_type} ke bajaye.

QR code generation automatic device configuration ke liye duplistatus se suchnaayein prapt karne ke liye Application toolbar mein View NTFY Messages button par right-click karein Sammaan → NTFY Sammaan mein "Configure Device" button

Automatic HTTP/HTTPS detection, connections is kram mein try kiye jaate hain: HTTPS → HTTPS with self-signed → HTTP fallback Collect Backup Logs interface mein Server selection dropdown seedhe server-specific collection ke liye Hostname mein multiple addresses (comma-separated) ab sweekar kiye jaate hain (same password aur port share karna chahiye) Dashboard (table), Sammaan → Backup Monitoring aur Sammaan → Server mein Single-server backup collection buttons jode gaye hain Bulk collection functionality sabhi servers ke liye valid configuration (url aur password) ke saath Sammaan → Backup Monitoring aur Sammaan → Server mein Collect All buttons Application toolbar mein Collect Backup Logs button par right-click context menu

SMTP Email Suchana Support: Sammaan → Email Sammaan mein SMTP server configuration NTFY aur/ya email suchnaayein ke liye prati-backup job configuration HTML-formatted templates jo maujooda Sammaan → Suchana Templates ka istemaal karte hain Prati-Backup Job Suchana Configuration: Sammaan → Backup Suchnaayein mein vyaktigat suchana pasandeeda Visual indicators (greyed icons) jab NTFY ya email sahi se configure na ho Locale support: application mein locale set karne ke liye naya environment variable LANG banaya gaya hai ab notifications aur logs mein dates aur numbers ka format anumanit hai

Session-based authentication majboot session prabandhan ke saath Sabhi state-changing API requests ke liye CSRF token validation lagu kiya gaya hai Sessions automatically expire hoti hain 24 ghante baad; CSRF tokens har 30 minute mein refresh hote hain Cross-Site Request Forgery ke khilaaf suraksha sunishchit karta hai jabki external APIs ke saath compatibility bani rehti hai
Passwords sirf user interface ke through set kiye ja sakte hain; koi API endpoint stored passwords ko expose nahi karta hai Plaintext password manipulation poore system mein minimize kiya gaya hai

documents.t: Sanvedansheel data encryption (jaise, passwords, SMTP credentials) AES-256-GCM ka upyog karke Master key svachaalit roop se banayi jaati hai aur .duplistatus.key mein surakshit roop se store ki jaati hai 100,000 iterations ke saath PBKDF2 suraksha ko mazboot karne ke liye key derivation ke liye upyog kiya jaata hai Authentication tags ki jaanch ki jaati hai aur istemaal ke baad memory ko surakshit roop se clear kar diya jaata hai Master key file permissions ko adhiktam suraksha ke liye sakhti se 0400 par set kiya gaya hai
documents.s: Sensitive Data ke liye Advanced Cryptography

documents.t: Behtar upyogita ke liye naye rang scheme aur iconography ke saath enhanced application styling Sudhare hue status indicators ke saath aadhunik design system Behtar drishya pratikriya ke liye rangon wale icons aur progress indicators Upyogita ko suvidhajanak banane ke liye Settings tabs ka naam badla gaya hai Streamlined API interactions aur behtar upyogkarta anubhav

Behtar navigation aur khoj ke liye Docusaurus ka upyog karke comprehensive documentation Vistrit endpoint varnanon ke saath enhanced API documentation Nayi suvidhaon aur suraksha sudhaaron ko cover karne wale updated user guides Behtar setup instructions ke saath installation guides Yogdaankartaon ke liye Development documentation

Behtar performance aur upyogkarta anubhav ke saath enhanced Next.js configuration Preload warnings ko kam karne ke liye optimised bundle splitting Connection issues aur API interactions ke liye behtar error handling Behtar configuration handling ke liye backup settings management ko refactor kiya gaya hai API interactions mein enhanced session management aur CSRF protection Behtar database migrations aur schema updates Kayi bug fixes aur code simplification.

Is release mein mahatvapurna suraksha sudhaar aur nayi suvidhaen shamil hain. Sanskaran 0.7.x se upgrade karte samay: Automatic Database Migration: Nayi suvidhaon ka samarthan karne ke liye application svachaalit roop se aapke database schema ko migrate karegi Master Key Generation: Sanvedansheel data ki encryption ke liye ek nayi master key banayi jayegi Session Management: Maujooda sessions ko avaidh kar diya jayega aur nayi CSRF-protected sessions sthapit ki jayengi Configuration Updates: Nayi suvidhaon ka samarthan karne ke liye kuchh configuration keys ko update kiya gaya hai Template changes: {backup_interval_value} aur {backup_interval_type} variables ko {backup_interval} se badal diya gaya hai. Default templates svachaalit roop se adjust ho jayenge, lekin custom templates migrate nahi honge. Kripya apne templates ki jaanch karein.

Master Key File: .duplistatus.key file ko uchit roop se backup aur surakshit kiya gaya hai, yah sunishchit karein File Permissions: Suraksha ke liye master key file mein pratibandhit permissions (0400) hongi Password Encryption: Maujooda passwords ko naye cryptographic system ka upyog karke encrypt kiya jayega

15 sekand se kam samay ke antar ke liye "abhi" return karne ke liye relative time formatting ko theek kiya gaya Missing environment variables ke liye error handling ko behtar banaya gaya Enhanced connection testing aur validation Vibhinn UI inconsistencies ko theek kiya gaya aur upyogkarta pratikriya ko behtar banaya gaya Yah release suraksha, upyogita, aur karyakshamata mein ek mahatvapurna kadam hai. Ham naye features aur suraksha sudharon ka labh uthane ke liye upgrade karne ki sifarish karte hain.

Sanskaran 0.9.x ek mahatvapurna release hai jo ek vyapak Upyogkarta Pahunch Niyantran aur Suraksha Pranali pesh karti hai. Yah release duplistatus ko ek khuli pahunch wale application se ek surakshit, bahu-upyogkarta pranali mein badal deti hai, jismein bhumika-aadhaarit pahunch niyantran, vyapak audit logging, aur enterprise-grade suraksha suvidhaen hain. Sabhi vidyamaan karyakshamata ab authentication ke peeche surakshit hai, yah sunishchit karte hue ki keval adhikrit upyogkarta hi backup monitoring tak pahunch sakte hain aur ise prabandhit kar sakte hain.

Sabhi prishth ab authentication ki maang karte hain - Application tak pahunchne ke liye upyogkartaon ko pravesh karna hoga Default admin account svayan banaya jaata hai: Username: admin Password: Duplistatus09 (pahli baar pravesh karne par badalna hoga) Vidyamaan sessions asafal kiye jaate hain - Upgrade ke baad sabhi upyogkartaon ko pravesh karna hoga API endpoints ab authentication ki maang karte hain - Bahari integrations mein session cookies shamil hone chahiye ya authenticated requests ka upyog karna chahiye warning Sanskaran 0.9.x mein upgrade karne ke baad sabhi upyogkartaon ko pravesh karna hoga. Default admin credentials admin/Duplistatus09 hain. Pahli baar pravesh karne ke turant baad password badlein.

Vidyamana installations ke liye v3.1 se v4.0 tak svayanpravartit migration Nayi tables jodi gayi hain: users, sessions, audit_log Migration se pehle database backup svayan banaya jaata hai Nayi installations seedhe schema v4.0 ke saath shuru hoti hain (migration ki avashyakta nahin hai)

Authentication Pranali​ Upyogkarta pravesh/pravesh se baahar niklein karyakshamata surakshit session prabandhan ke saath Password-aadhaarit authentication bcrypt hashing ke saath (lagat kaarak 12) Account lockout mechanism (5 asafal prayas, 15-minute lockout) Pahli baar pravesh karne par anivarya password badlav Password policy ka pravartan: Nyunatam 8 akshar Kam se kam ek uppercase akshar Kam se kam ek lowercase akshar Kam se kam ek sankhya Vishesh akshar vaikalpik hain "Mujhe yaad rakhein" karyakshamata localStorage mein username persistence ke saath Session-aadhaarit authentication database-backed sessions ke saath (in-memory ka sthan leta hai) CSRF suraksha authentication ke saath integrate ki gayi Session suraksha ke liye HTTP-only cookies Suraksha monitoring ke liye IP pata aur upyogkarta agent tracking Upyogkarta Prabandhan (Keval Admin)​ Upyogkarta nirman svayanpravartit aarthik password generation ke saath Upyogkarta soochi khoj, pagination, aur filtering ke saath Upyogkarta editing (username, admin sthiti, password badlav ki avashyakta) Password reset karyakshamata aarthik password pradarshan ke saath Upyogkarta hatana suraksha upaayon ke saath (akhiri admin ko hatane se rokta hai) Bhumika-aadhaarit pahunch niyantran (Admin/Upyogkarta bhumikaen) Stithi sanketak (Sakriya, Lock Kiya, Password Badalna Hai) Antim login tracking aur pradarshan Audit Logging Pranali​ Sabhi pranali badlavon aur upyogkarta kriyaon ke liye vyapak audit trail Audit log viewer advanced filtering ke saath: Taareekh shrinkhala filtering Upyogkarta filtering Kriya filtering Category filtering Stithi filtering Niryaat karyakshamata (CSV aur JSON format mein) Audit log aankde aur analytics Configurable retention period (30-365 din, default: 90 din) Automatic cleanup cron job (rooj 2 AM UTC par chalta hai) Manual cleanup API with dry-run support Audit logging ke liye: Authentication events (login, Pravesh se baahar niklein, Password parivartan, account lockouts) Upyogkarta prabandhan operations (create, update, Delete karein, Password reset) Configuration parivartan (Email, NTFY, Templates, Vilambit tolerance, backup Sammaan) Backup operations (collection, deletion, cleanup) Server prabandhan (add, update, delete) Pranali operations (migrations, cleanup, Suchnaayein)

documents.t: Modern sidebar navigation with collapsible sidebar Upyogkarta-vishisht sidebar state persistence (collapsed/expanded preference saved per user) Grouped settings sections: Suchnaayein: Backup suchnaayein, Backup monitoring, Templates Integrations: NTFY, Email Pranali: Server, Upyogkarta (admin only), Audit log Sticky sidebar that remains visible while scrolling Responsive design with optimised spacing Sammaan icon and "Pranali Sammaan" shirshak in sidebar header Peechhe button integrated into app header

Standalone pravesh karein page with modern design "Mujhe yaad rakhein" checkbox on pravesh karein form for username persistence Dikhayein/chhipe password buttons on pravesh karein and password change forms Password badlein modal with real-time validation checklist Upyogkarta indicator and pravesh se baahar niklein button in app header Bhumika-based UI visibility (admin-only features hidden from regular users) Stithi badges and indicators throughout the UI Upyogkarta-vishisht preferences stored in localStorage (e.g., sidebar collapsed state)

Password hashing with bcrypt (industry-standard) Sensitive data sanitization in audit logs (passwords, tokens, secrets never logged) Rate limiting for pravesh karein attempts Session expiration (24 ghante) CSRF token validation for all state-changing operations Admin recovery CLI tool for password reset if locked out

Admin recovery CLI script (admin-recovery) for easy execution in Docker containers Works both locally and in Docker with automatic path detection Comprehensive TypeScript interfaces (no any types) Pravesh karein middleware for route protection Audit logger utility class with convenience methods

Is release introduces pravesh karein and requires all users to log in. When upgrading from version 0.8.x: Automatic Database Migration: The application will automatically migrate your database schema from v3.1 to v4.0 Database Backup: An automatic backup is created before migration Default Admin Account: A default admin account is created: Username: admin Password: Duplistatus09 Aapko is password ko pehle pravesh karein par badalna hoga Session Invalidation: All existing sessions are invalidated Upyogkarta Pravesh karein Required: All users must log in after upgrade API Pramanikaran: Bahari integrations ko pramanikaran shamil karne ke liye update kiya jana chahiye

Default Password Badlein: Pahle pravesh ke turant baad default admin password badlein Upyogkarta Khate Banayein: Access ki zaroorat wale pratyek vyakti ke liye alag upyogkarta khate banayein Audit Logs Ki Samiksha Karein: Suraksha nigrani ke liye niyamit roop se audit logs ki janch karein Retention Configure Karein: Apni compliance avashyaktaon ke aadhar par uchit audit log retention avadhi nirdharit karein Master Key Ka Backup: Yadi 0.8.x se upgrade kar rahe hain, to .duplistatus.key file ka backup lena sunishchit karein

Default credentials (admin / Duplistatus09) ke saath Pravesh karein Sanket diye jaane par password badlein (pahle pravesh par majboor) Anya upyogkartaon ke liye upyogkarta khate banayein (Sammaan → Upyogkarta) Yadi avashyak ho to audit log retention configure karein (Sammaan → Audit Log) Pranali ke sahi dhang se kaam karne ki pushti ke liye audit logs ki samiksha karein

Server restart hone par session persistence samasyaon ko theek kiya gaya Pramanikaran vifaltaon ke liye truti handling mein sudhar Password validation feedback mein sudhar Sammaan page mein UI inconsistencies ko theek kiya gaya Audit log filtering performance mein sudhar
POST /api/auth/login - Upyogkarta pramanikaran POST /api/auth/logout - Session samapti GET /api/auth/me - Vartaman upyogkarta ki jankari POST /api/auth/change-password - Password badlav
GET /api/users - Upyogkartaon ki soochi POST /api/users - Upyogkarta banayein PATCH /api/users/{id} - Upyogkarta update karein DELETE /api/users/{id} - Upyogkarta ko delete karein

GET /api/audit-log - Audit logs query karein GET /api/audit-log/download - Audit logs export karein GET /api/audit-log/stats - Audit aankde POST /api/audit-log/cleanup - Manual cleanup (keval admin) GET /api/audit-log/retention - Retention setting prapt karein PATCH /api/audit-log/retention - Retention update karein (keval admin) Note Sabhi API endpoints ko ab pramanikaran ki avashyakta hogi. Pramanikaran par vivaran ke liye API Sandarbh dekhein.

Sanskaran 1.0.x ek feature release hai jo email configuration, server prabandhan kshamataon, aur database maintenance tools mein mahatvapurn sudhaar laata hai. Yah release email suchna vishvasniyata mein sudhaar karne, SMTP connection vikalpon ko vistarit karne, aur serveron aur database integrity ko prabandhit karne ke liye behtar tools pradaan karne par kendrit hai.

Server password badalne ki suvidha - Upyogkarta ab server detail prushth se seedhe server password badal sakte hain, key icon par click karke Duplicate server ka pata lagana aur merge karna - Database maintenance form mein duplicate serveron ka pata lagane aur unhein ek server entry mein merge karne ke liye naya function

Backup upload audit logging - /api/upload endpoint ke maadhyam se sabhi backup log upload ab audit log mein svachaalit roop se logged hote hain. Har entry mein backup vivaran (server ID, server naam, backup naam, stithi, taareekh, avadhi, file sankhya, aakaar, chetaavaniyaan, aur trutiyan) client IP pata aur upyogkarta agent jaankari ke saath tracking aur suraksha ke uddeshya se shaamil hain

Configuration adhoori suchna - Jab email settings theek se configure nahin ki jaati hain to dikhai dene wala alert Service stithi indicator - Jab email sevaayein configure nahin ki jaati hain to notification checkbox par "(nishkriya)" labels dikhaaye jaate hain Customizable bhejane wale ki jaankari: Sender Name field custom karne ke liye display naam jo email suchnaon mein bhejane wale ke roop mein dikhta hai From Address field email address specify karne ke liye jo bhejane wale ke roop mein dikhta hai Note: Kuch email provider From Address ko SMTP Server Username se override kar denge SMTP authentication toggle - SMTP authentication ko enable ya disable karne ka vikalp, aise serveron ka samarthan karta hai jinhein authentication ki zaroorat nahin hai Email format validation - Praaptak aur se address fields ke liye validation taaki email address ka sahi format sunishchit ho sake Sudhaara hua test email - Test email ab sampoorn connection vivaran dikhaata hai jismein SMTP server hostname, port, connection type, authentication stithi, username (yadi laagoo ho), praaptak email, se address, bhejane wale ka naam, aur test samay chinh shaamil hain

Bahut saare connection types - Teen connection types ka samarthan: Plain SMTP (koi encryption nahin) port 25 par STARTTLS (TLS mein upgrade) port 587 par Direct SSL/TLS (shuruaat se encrypted) port 465 par Default connection type - Nayi configurations ke liye Direct SSL/TLS mein badla gaya Connection-vishesh aavashyaktaayein - From Address field Plain SMTP connections ke liye zaroori hai taaki email bhejane wale ki pehchaan aur RFC 5322 compliance sunishchit ho sake

Ghayab From header theek kiya gaya - RFC 5322 compliance trutiyon ko theek kiya gaya hai, yeh sunishchit karte hue ki sabhi email sandeshon mein From headers shaamil hon STARTTLS ke liye email encryption theek ki gayi - STARTTLS connections (port 587) ke liye encryption handling ko theek kiya gaya Plain SMTP connections theek kiye gaye - TLS negotiation trutiyon ko theek kiya gaya tha jiske kaaran Plain SMTP connections fail ho rahe the Save na ki gayi configuration ka nuksaan theek kiya gaya - Password badalte samay save na ki gayi email configuration ko clear hone se roka gaya Stale SMTP configuration theek ki gayi - Aisi samasya ko theek kiya gaya jahan test email endpoint purani SMTP configuration ka upyog kar raha tha

Password visibility toggle theek kiya gaya - Password badalne wale form mein view password feature ke vyavhaar ko theek kiya gaya; eye icon par click karne se ab dono password fields ke liye password ek saath dikhta hai

Docker entrypoint logging theek kiya gaya - Aisi samasya ko theek kiya gaya jahan Docker entrypoint script log sandeshon ko chhod raha tha Next Run taareekh calculation theek ki gayi - Backup logs collect karne ke baad Next Run taareekh ki svachaalit punarganana jodi gayi hai, yeh sunishchit karte hue ki log collection ke baad taareekh theek se update ho

Yah release mein email configuration aur server management ke liye sudhaar shamil hain. Sanskaran 0.9.x se upgrade karte samay: Database Migration Ki Zaroorat Nahin - Is release ke liye kisi bhi database schema badlav ki zaroorat nahin hai Email Configuration Updates - Maujooda email configurations kaam karti rahengi, lekin aap nayi suvidhaon ka fayda uthane ke liye apni settings ki jaanch aur update karna chah sakte hain: Behtar email pehchan ke liye ek anukoolit Sender Name set karne par vichar karein Apne From Address ki jaanch karein ki vah sahi dhang se set hai, khaas taur par jab Plain SMTP connections ka istemal kar rahe hon Behtar test email suvidha ka upyog karke apni email configuration ka parikshan karein Connection Type Default - Nayi email configurations default roop se Direct SSL/TLS connection type par set hongi Server Password Management - Ab aap server password ko seedhe server detail page se badal sakte hain bina backups ko dobara collect kiye

Production use ke liye: Surakshit email delivery ke liye STARTTLS ya Direct SSL/TLS connections ka upyog karein Local testing ke liye: Bharosemand local networks ke liye Plain SMTP connections uplabdh hain From Address ki avashyakta: Plain SMTP ka upyog karte samay ya jab authentication disable ho, to sunishchit karein ki From Address field sahi dhang se configure kiya gaya hai Apni configuration ka parikshan karein: Apne email setup ke sahi kaam karne ki pushti ke liye hamesha "Send Test Email" button ka upyog karein

GET /api/email/config - Email configuration prapt karein POST /api/email/config - Email configuration update karein POST /api/email/test - Test email bhejein DELETE /api/email/config - Email configuration delete karein
PATCH /api/servers/{id}/password - Server password update karein POST /api/database/maintenance/merge-duplicate-servers - Duplicate servers merge karein

Sanskaran 1.1.x ek laghu release hai jo vilambit backup ka pata lagane mein aane wali gambhir samasyao ko hal karti hai, Podman container anukoolata ko behtar banati hai, aur container architecture mein sudhar lati hai. Yah release vilambit backup ka pata lagane ki shuddhta ko theek karne aur Podman parivesh mein networking samasyao ko hal karne par kendrit hai.

Auto-refresh button par Right-click context menu - Application toolbar mein auto-refresh button par right-click karne se display pasand ke liye display settings page khul jata hai Behtar collect backups modal - Jab koi server chuna jata hai to password field label ab spasht roop se "(Sirf tab bharein jab password badla ho)" darshata hai, jisse yah spasht ho jata hai ki kab field ki avashyakta hai

Dastavejikaran hosting migration - Dastavejikaran ko Docker container image se GitHub Pages par https://wsj-br.github.io/duplistatus/user-guide/overview par sthanantarit kar diya gaya hai taki pahunch aur aasan updates mein sudhar ho sake App header mein User Guide link ab bahari dastavejikaran site ki or ishara karta hai

Vilambit backup ka pata lagana theek kiya gaya - Ek naye algorithm ke saath vilambit backup ka pata lagane wale system ko poori tarah se punarnirmit kiya gaya hai jo apekshit backup tithiyon ko sahi dhang se track karta hai: Algorithm sunishchit karta hai ki manual backup scheduled backup samay ko na badle (udaharan, 10pm ka manual backup 2pm ke schedule ko nahi badlega) Backup monitoring settings mein "Aage ke chalan" column mein galat tithiyon ko dikhane wali samasya ko theek kiya gaya Backup settings ab /api/upload ya /api/backups/collect dwara backup prapt karne ke turant baad update ho jati hain Duplicati sync ke bina naye servers ke liye, schedule reference ke roop mein pehle backup ke samay ka upyog karta hai Adhik vivaran ke liye, Vilambit Pata Lagane ka Algorithm dastavejikaran dekhein
documents.s: Gambhir: Vilambit Backup Pata Lagana - Pura Punarnirman

documents.t: Podman pod networking theek kiya gaya - Podman pods mein chalne par application tak bahari pahunch ko rokne wali samasya ko hal kiya gaya. Server ab Podman pod aur standalone container donon modes mein sabhi interfaces (0.0.0.0:9666) par sahi dhang se bind hota hai Tailscale hostnames ke liye DNS resolution theek kiya gaya - Podman containers mein DNS resolution samasyao ko hal kiya gaya jisse Tailscale hostnames ya custom DNS servers se judne mein rukavat aati thi. Nirdeshon ke saath install dastavejikaran ko update kiya gaya hai.

SMTP khali username/password handling theek kiya gaya - Is samasya ko hal kiya gaya jahan email configuration mein username ya password fields ko khali karne par bhi encrypted values database mein store ho jati thin. Khali fields ab sahi dhang se khali strings ke roop mein store hote hain aur sahi dhang se khali kiye ja sakte hain
Console logging kam kiya gaya - AuditLogger ab kewal asafal login prayason ko console mein log karta hai; anya sabhi audit entries kewal database mein likhi jati hain

Sanskaran 1.1.0 mein upgrade karte samay: Dastavejikaran Sthan Parivartan - Dastavejikaran ab Docker container mein shamil hone ke bajaye GitHub Pages par host kiya gaya hai. App header mein User Guide link ab bahari dastavejikaran site ki or ishara karta hai Podman Container Configuration - Yadi Podman pods ka upyog kar rahe hain, to sunishchit karein ki DNS configuration pod level par --dns aur --dns-search flags ka upyog karke set ki gayi hai. Application ab Podman pods aur standalone containers donon mein sahi dhang se kaam karta hai Vilambit Backup Pata Lagana - Vilambit backup ka pata lagane wale system ko ek naye algorithm ke saath poori tarah se punarnirmit kiya gaya hai jo schedule samay ko banaye rakhta hai. Maujooda backup monitoring configurations kaam karti rahengi, lekin aapko backup monitoring settings mein adhik shuddh "Aage ke chalan" tithiyan dikh sakti hain. Naya algorithm sunishchit karta hai ki manual backup scheduled backup samay ko nahi badalte hain Database Migration Ki Avashyakta Nahi - Is release ke liye kisi bhi database schema parivartan ki avashyakta nahi hai
Is release mein koi naye API endpoints nahi jode gaye hain. Sabhi maujooda endpoints avam parivartit hain.
