Jab aap truti report karein, kripya shamil karein: Sanskaran: 1.1.x (vichitra sanskaran batayein, jaise, 1.1.0) Operating system aur sanskaran Docker/podman sanskaran Container prakar (Docker ya podman/Pod) Truti sandesh aur logs Punarutpadan ke liye kadam Podman configuration vivaran (agar podman/Pod mein chal raha hai)

Joda gaya: Auto-refresh button par right-click context menu Display settings kholne ke liye Joda gaya: Collect backups modal mein password field label mein sudhar Parivartit: Docker container image se documentation hataya gaya (ab GitHub Pages par hosted hai) Parivartit: App header User Guide link ko GitHub Pages documentation ki taraf ishara karne ke liye update kiya gaya Parivartit: AuditLogger se console logging kam kiya gaya (keval asafal login prayason ko console mein log kiya gaya hai) Theek kiya gaya: Vilambit backup ka pata lagane mein gambhir truti, apekshit backup tareekh tracking ko uchit roop se lagu karke (vivaran ke liye Vilambit Pata Lagane ka Algorithm dekhein) Theek kiya gaya: Podman pod networking samasyaen jo bahari access ko rok rahi thin Theek kiya gaya: Podman containers mein Tailscale hostnames ke liye DNS resolution Theek kiya gaya: SMTP configuration dwara khali username aur password fields ke liye encrypted values store karna Theek kiya gaya: Backup monitoring settings mein "Aage ke chalan" column mein galat tareekhein dikhana
Yah pariyojana Apache License 2.0 ke tahat license prapt hai. Copyright © 2025 Waldemar Scudeller Jr.

Sanskaran 1.2.1 ek chhoti release hai jo backup suchna prabandhan mein mahatvapurna sudhaar laati hai, audit logging kshamataon ko behtar banati hai, edge cases par agle chalan/vilambit ka pata lagane mein sudhaar karti hai, aur database backup aur restore functionality jodti hai. Yah release suchna samman ke saath upyogkarta anubhav ko behtar banane par kendrit hai.

Server-level default aur inheritance system: Server-level par aadhit gantavya (suchna ghatnaayein, email, aur NTFY topics) configure karein jinhein sabhi backups svachaalit roop se inherit karte hain. Jab zaroorat ho to backups in defaults ko override kar sakte hain, inheritance sthiti ko darshane wale spasht drishya sanketon ke saath. Behtar drishya hierarchy: Backups ab server dwara group kiye jaate hain jismein spasht server header rows hote hain. Inherited maan link icons ke saath spasht roop se chihnit hote hain, aur overridden maanon ko aasani se inheritance par revert kiya ja sakta hai. Bulk operations: "Sabhi ke saath sankalit karein" button sabhi backup overrides ko saaf karta hai taaki sabhi backups server defaults se inherit kar sakein. "Sabhi saaf karein" button sabhi aadhitheeya gantavya ko saaf karta hai jabki inheritance structure ko banaye rakhta hai. Parikshan functionality: Backup Suchna Sammaan page mein seedhe test email aur test suchna buttons jode gaye hain. Test buttons vyaktigat backup samman aur bulk sampadan operations donon ke liye uplabdh hain, jisse aap parivartanon ko laagoo karne se pehle suchna pahunch ki pushti kar sakte hain. QR code support: Mobile devices ke saath suchna topics ko aasani se share karne ke liye NTFY topics ke liye QR code button joda gaya hai.

Naya {log_text} variable: Suchna templates mein {log_text} variable joda gaya hai, jo suchna sandeshon mein istemaal ke liye log text sandeshon tak pahunch pradaan karta hai. Variable mein chetaavaniyon aur trutiyon ka poora text shaamil hai, jo plain text ke roop mein prati line ek item ke saath format kiya gaya hai. Svachaalit template migration: System mein ek lazy upgrade mechanism shaamil hai jo upgrade ke baad pehli baar padhe jaane par purane default templates ka svachaalit roop se pata lagata hai aur unhein update karta hai. Anukoolit templates ko bina badle rakha jaata hai.

Database backup functionality: Administrator ab Database Maintenance samman page se poore database ka backup bana sakte hain. Lacheelepan ke liye binary (.db) aur SQL text (.sql) donon formats ka samarthan karta hai. Database restore functionality: Svachaalit suraksha backup banane, integrity validation, aur failure par rollback ke saath pehle banaye gaye backup files se database ko restore karein. Suraksha ke liye restore ke baad sabhi sessions saaf kar diye jaate hain.

Svachaalit master key parivartan detection: Login ke baad, system svachaalit roop se jaanchta hai ki .duplistatus.key file mein parivartan hua hai ya nahin. Yadi pata chalta hai, to sabhi encrypted passwords saaf kar diye jaate hain aur ek modal popup upyogkartaon ko suchit karta hai ki passwords ko phir se configure karne ki zaroorat hai. Yah backups se restore karte samay ya naye system mein migrate karte samay trutiyon ko rokta hai.

Behtar CSV export: Backup monitoring samman mein "CSV download karein" button dwara generate ki gayi CSV file mein "Antim Backup Timestamp (DB)" column joda gaya hai. Yah upyogkartaon ko database se vastavik antim backup timestamp ki tulna configure ki gayi "Antim Backup" timestamp se karne ki anumati deta hai. Aage ke chalan tooltip: Prati row mein "Aage ke chalan" maan par hover karne par ab database se antim backup timestamp dikhane wala ek tooltip pradarshit hota hai, jo "Aage ke chalan" display ke saman roop mein format kiya gaya hai.

Vyaktigat suchana audit pravishtiyan: Bheji gayi har suchana aur email ab channel, configuration, aur parinaam (safalta ya asafalta) ke vivaran ke saath ek alag audit log pravishti banati hai. Ismein parikshan suchnayein shamil hain, jo suchana pahunchane ke liye behtar traceability pradan karti hain. Majboot asafalta logging: Suchana asafaltaon ke liye sabhi audit logging operations ab try-catch blocks mein lapete gaye hain taki audit logging trutiyon ko suchana pravah ko todne se roka ja sake. Pranali SMTP configuration prapt karne ka prayas karti hai yadi email asafaltaon ko log karte samay vah turant uplabdh na ho. Configuration updates ke liye behtar audit logging: email_config_updated aur ntfy_config_updated dono audit log pravishtiyan ab kewal tabhi record karti hain jab configuration mein vastavik parivartan hote hain. Jab parivartan pata chalte hain, to audit log mein pratyek sanshodhit kshetra ke liye purane aur naye moolya shamil hote hain, jisse yah track karna aasan ho jata hai ki vishesh roop se kya badla hai.
Dastavejikaran shaili ko application ke look aur feel se mel khane ke liye update kiya gaya hai. Sidebar ko bhi drishyata sudharne aur navigation ko aasan banane ke liye sanshodhit kiya gaya hai.

Audit log timestamps theek kiye gaye: Audit log viewer mein timestamps ab GMT ke bajaye upyogkarta ke browser timezone mein sahi dhang se pradarshit hote hain. SQLite timestamps (UTC mein store kiye gaye) ab sahi dhang se UTC ke roop mein parse kiye jate hain aur pradarshan ke liye browser ke sthaniya timezone mein parivartit kiye jate hain. "Aage ke chalan" calculation aur vilambit detection ko durust kiya gaya: Backup monitoring settings mein "Aage ke chalan" column ab backup schedule aur antim backup timestamp dono ko dhyan mein rakhte hue, agle apekshit backup tareekh ki sahi dhang se calculation karta hai aur pradarshit karta hai. Yah scheduled aur manually run kiye gaye backup jobs dono par lagu hota hai, jiske parinaam swaroop adhik vishwasniya vilambit detection hota hai.

Sanskaran 1.2.1 mein upgrade karte samay: Suchana Templates: Pranali pahli baar access karne par default notification templates ko naye {log_text} variable ko shamil karne ke liye swachalit roop se update karegi. Anukoolit templates aprivartit rahengi. Yadi aap apne templates mein naye {log_text} variable ka upyog karna chahte hain, to aapko unhein update karna hoga ya default templates ko manually restore karna hoga. Master Key Parivartan: Yadi aap backup se restore karte hain ya alag .duplistatus.key file wale naye system mein migrate karte hain, to pranali ise swachalit roop se detect karegi aur encrypted passwords (SMTP passwords aur Duplicati server passwords) ko configure karne ke liye prompt karegi. Database Backup/Restore: Database Maintenance settings page mein naye database backup aur restore functionality uplabdh hai. Upgrade karne se pehle backup banana anushansit hai, halanki is release ke liye kisi database schema parivartan ki avashyakta nahi hai. Database Migration Anivarya Nahi: Is release ke liye kisi database schema parivartan ki avashyakta nahi hai.
Is sanskaran mein nimnalikhit API endpoints prastut kiye gaye hain.
GET /api/auth/admin-must-change-password - Jaanch karein ki admin upyogkarta ko password badalna hai ya nahi
GET /api/database/backup - Database backup banayein (binary ya SQL format) POST /api/database/restore - Backup file se database restore karein
GET /api/backups/last-timestamps - Sabhi server-backup combination ke liye antim backup timestamps prapt karein

Bugs report karte samay, kripya shamil karein: Sanskaran: 1.2.1 Operating system aur sanskaran Docker/podman sanskaran Container type (Docker ya podman/Pod) Truti sandesh aur logs Reproduce karne ke liye steps

Joda gaya: Backup suchnaayein ke liye server-star par default aur inheritance pranali Joda gaya: Backup Notifications settings mein test email aur test notification functionality Joda gaya: NTFY topics ke liye QR code button Joda gaya: backup monitoring CSV export mein "Antim Backup Samay chinh (DB)" column Joda gaya: backup monitoring settings mein "Aage ke chalan" text mein tooltip Joda gaya: bheje gaye har notification aur email ke liye alag audit log entries Joda gaya: notification failures ke liye behtar audit logging majbooti Joda gaya: notification templates mein {log_text} variable jismein automatic template migration shamil hai Joda gaya: master key file changes ka automatic pata lagana Joda gaya: Database Backup functionality (binary aur SQL formats) Joda gaya: suraksha backups aur integrity validation ke saath Database Restore functionality Joda gaya: admin password badlav ki avashyakta check karne ke liye API endpoint GET /api/auth/admin-must-change-password Joda gaya: database backups banane ke liye API endpoint GET /api/database/backup Joda gaya: backup se database restore karne ke liye API endpoint POST /api/database/restore Joda gaya: antim backup timestamps prapt karne ke liye API endpoint GET /api/backups/last-timestamps Badla gaya: email aur NTFY configuration updates ke liye audit logging mein sudhaar (sirf vastavik badlav record karta hai) Badla gaya: Password badlav forms mein ab unmasked passwords dikhate samay confirmation ki avashyakta nahi hai. Badla gaya: Jab password badlav forms band hote hain, to passwords ko surakshit roop se memory se clear kar diya jata hai. Badla gaya: collect backups form mein password view toggle shamil kiya gaya. Badla gaya: {server_alias} variable ab server naam ko brackets mein dikhata hai Badla gaya: Documentation update ki gayi, application ke saath style align kiya gaya aur sidebar ko refactor kiya gaya. Theek kiya gaya: Audit log timestamps GMT mein dikh rahe the browser timezone ke bajaye Theek kiya gaya: Email aur NTFY failure audit logging Theek kiya gaya: backup monitoring settings mein "Aage ke chalan" display galat dates dikha raha tha

Sanskaran 1.3.0 mein configure karna yogy password nitiyaan, ek naya application log viewer prabandhakon ke liye, sthaniya anusaar saptaah ke din ka pradarshan, aur kai upyogkarta anubhav sudhaar shamil hain. Is release mein vishisht prabandhan upkarnon aur sudharit antarrashtriyaikaran samarthan par dhyan kendrit kiya gaya hai.

Password niti paryavaran vikalp: Paryavaran vikalpon ke madhyam se password validation aavashyaktaon ko configure karein: PWD_ENFORCE: Nishkriya karne ke liye false par set karein password jatilta aavashyaktaon (uppercase, lowercase, sankhyayein). Default roop se sabhi niyamon ka bal hai. Jab nishkriya hota hai, keval nyunatam lambai ka bal hota hai. PWD_MIN_LEN: Password ki nyunatam lambai character mein nirdharit karta hai. Default roop se 8 characters hota hai. Default password janch (prabandhak password ka upyog rokne wala) hamesha PWD_ENFORCE setting ke bavjood bal hota hai.

Naya prabandhak-only log viewer: Seedhe Settings page se application logs ka avlokan aur download karein: Samarthit application.log file aur ghoomti hui log sanskaranon ka avlokan Rekhank ka chayan karne wala (100, 500, 1000, 5000, 10000 rekhayein) Vaastavik samay mein khoj filter ke sath case-insensitive text matching Auto-scroll toggle vaastavik samay mein log monitoring ke liye svaichalit polling ke sath Clipboard mein copy karein aur filtered logs ko text file ke roop mein export karein File metadata pradarshan jo rekhank gina, file aakar, aur antim parivartit samay chinh dikhata hai Container startup par log rotation (LOG_ROTATION_VERSIONS ke madhyam se configure kiya ja sakta hai, default: 5)

Dynamic sahayata button: App header mein Upyogkarta Margdarshika button ab vartaman page se sambandhit dastavez khulta hai. Tooltip update hota hai "Page Name ke liye sahayata" dikhane ke liye ki kaun sa dastavez khulega.
Duplicati UI tak jaldi pahunch: Server sammanvaya button ya server chayan popover mein kisi bhi server item par right-click karne se Duplicati legacy UI (/ngax) naye tab mein khulta hai.

Antarrashtriya saptaah ke din ka kram: Backup monitoring form mein saptaah ke din ka pradarshan ab aapke browser ke sthaniya setting ko sammanit karta hai. Saptaah ke din sahi kram mein pradarshit hote hain (Somvaar-Ravivaar ke liye UK/Yurope, Ravivaar-Shanivaar ke liye US/Brazil).
documents.s: Sthaniya Anusaar Saptaah Ke Din Ka Pradarshan

documents.t: Sudharit truti sandesh: SMTP truti sandesh ab adhik satik margdarshan pradan karte hain: Pramanikaran truti spasht roop se username/password samasyaon ko darshate hain SSL/TLS sanskaran truti sahi roop se pahchani jaati hain Connection type sujhav keval tabhi pradarshit hote hain jab ve vaastavik roop se prasangik hote hain

Sthayi truti suchnaayein: Truti toasts ab manav roop se band kiye jaane tak sthayi rehte hain, isse aapko mahatvapoorn truti sandesh na chhute. Safalta aur suchna toasts 3 second ke baad svaichalit roop se avagat hote hain.
Saralit layout: Suchna sammanvaya table ko ek sahit "Server / Backup" column aur sandarbhik chinhon ke sath sudharit kiya gaya hai jo additional destination sammanvaya sthiti ko darshate hain.

Jab upgrade version 1.3.0 mein karein: Password Niti: Nayi password niti sabhi jatilata avashyaktaon ko lagu karne ke liye default hai. Yadi aapko ek saral password niti ki avashyakta hai, to PWD_ENFORCE aur PWD_MIN_LEN environment variables ko configure karein. Application Logs: Sabhi container output (server aur cron service) ab ek data/logs/application.log file mein sammilit hain. Log Rotation: Log rotation LOG_ROTATION_VERSIONS environment variable dwara configure kiya ja sakta hai (default: 5 versions). Database Migration Anivarya Nahi: Is release ke liye kisi database schema parivartan ki avashyakta nahi hai.
Is version mein nimnalikhit API endpoint shuru kiya gaya hai:
GET /api/auth/password-policy - Vartaman password niti configuration vapas karta hai
GET /api/application-logs - File selection aur tail functionality ke saath logs dekhein GET /api/application-logs/export - Filtered logs ko text file ke roop mein export karein

Nimnalikhit anupyogi API endpoints is version mein hataye gaye hain: DELETE /api/backups/[backupId] - Development-only endpoint jiska kabhi upyog nahi kiya gaya GET /api/audit-log/stats - Audit log viewer dwara endpoint ko call nahi kiya gaya tha

Jab bugs report karein, kripya shamil karein: Sanskaran: 1.3.0 Operating system aur sanskaran Docker/podman sanskaran Container type (Docker ya podman/Pod) Truti sandesh aur logs Reproduce karne ke liye steps

Joda gaya: PWD_ENFORCE aur PWD_MIN_LEN environment variables ke dwara configure yogya password niti Joda gaya: Settings mein Application logs viewer (keval Admin) Joda gaya: Configure yogya version count ke saath Log rotation (LOG_ROTATION_VERSIONS) Joda gaya: Sandarbh-sajag Upyogkarta Margdarshan button jo sambandhit documentation kholta hai Joda gaya: Duplicati legacy UI kholne ke liye server configuration par Right-click karein Joda gaya: Password niti configuration ke liye API endpoint GET /api/auth/password-policy Joda gaya: Application logs viewing aur export ke liye API endpoints Badla gaya: Saptah ke dinon ka pradarshan ab browser locale settings ka samman karta hai Badla gaya: Truti toasts tab tak bani rahti hain jab tak ki manaviy roop se band na ho jayein Badla gaya: Safalta toasts 3 seconds (pehle 5 seconds) ke baad swatah dismiss ho jati hain Badla gaya: "Server / Backup" column ko milakar Notification settings table ko saral banaya gaya Badla gaya: Sabhi container logs ko ek application.log file mein sammilit kiya gaya Sudhara gaya: SMTP truti sandesh adhik sateek margdarshan pradan karte hain Hataya gaya: Anupyogi API endpoints (DELETE /api/backups/[backupId] aur GET /api/audit-log/stats) jinhe application dwara call nahi kiya ja raha tha

Sanskaran 1.3.1 mein application interface ke liye poora multi-language support shuru kiya gaya hai, ek additional endpoints par authentication ko anivarya karke API suraksha ko mazboot kiya gaya hai, aur master key detection, locale formatting, aur notification settings se sambandhit kai bugs ko theek kiya gaya hai. Yah release internationalisation sudhaar aur suraksha hardening par kendrit hai.

App header mein Language selector: User menu mein dropdown se apni pasandeeda interface bhasha chunein. Supported bhashayein: English, Deutsch, Français, Español, aur Português (BR). Aapki chayan save ho jaati hai aur sessions mein bani rehti hai. Locale-aware navigation: Sabhi pages aur links ab aapki chuni hui bhasha mein consistent navigation ke liye locale-prefixed URLs ko support karte hain.

Template language selector: Notification templates ab ek dedicated language selector ke saath multiple bhashaon ko support karte hain. Sabhi 5 supported bhashaon ke liye pehle se anuvadit default templates uplabdh hain. Reset vikalp: "Is template ko default par reset karen" aur "Sabhi ko default par reset karen" buttons bhasha badalte samay template management ko aasan banane ke liye confirmation dialogs ke saath. Locale-aware notification content: Notifications mein taareekh, samay, sankhya, aur backup status values ab template bhasha ke anusaar format kiye jaate hain.

Locale-aware date aur time formatting: Application mein har jagah (dashboard, server details, charts, tooltips) taareekh aur samay ab aapke locale ke liye upyukt format mein dikhte hain (udaharan ke liye European locales ke liye DD/MM/YYYY, English ke liye MM/DD/YYYY). Locale-aware number formatting: Sankhya, file size, aur aankde locale-upyukt formatting ka upyog karte hain (udaharan ke liye German ke liye 1.234,56, English ke liye 1,234.56).
Right-to-left bhashaon ke liye foundation: Bhavishya mein RTL bhashaon (Arabic, Hebrew) ko support karne ke liye infrastructure joda gaya hai. Vartaman bhashayein left-to-right hain.

Additional endpoints par anivarya authentication: Nimnalikhit endpoints ab ek vaidh session aur CSRF token ki maang karte hain (pehle optional auth tha): /api/backups/collect /api/backups/sync-schedule /api/cron-config (POST) /api/notifications/check-overdue /api/notifications/clear-overdue-timestamps Dependency security updates: Gyat suraksha samasyaon ko hal karne ke liye vulnerable dependencies (fast-xml-parser, brace-expansion) ko upgrade kiya gaya hai.

Master key change detection: Database aur .duplistatus.key file ko ek saath restore karte samay galat "key changed" detection ko theek kiya gaya hai (same key). System ab decryption-based checks ke bajaye reliable detection ke liye key fingerprint ka upyog karta hai jo data corruption ko galati se key change samajh sakte hain. Detail page initial load: Server detail page ab pehle load par hi overdue sandesh aur data ko sahi dhang se dikhata hai, na ki sirf pehle auto-refresh ke baad.

Consistent labels: Samay units, intervals, status labels, aur aam shabd ab application mein consistently dikhte hain. Locale-aware weekday ordering: Backup monitoring mein dinon ka display aapki bhasha/locale ka samman karta hai. Ise Display Settings mein override kiya ja sakta hai.

Stable error aur success codes: Auth endpoints (/api/auth/login, /api/auth/logout, /api/auth/me, /api/auth/change-password, /api/auth/password-policy) ab English error ya message field ke alawa errorCode (aur safalta par, successCode) return karte hain. Clients in codes ka upyog user ki bhasha mein localized sandesh dikhane ke liye karte hain. Login page: Sabhi login error sandesh (udaharan ke liye, "Username aur password avashyak hain", "Galat username ya password", "Account lock ho gaya hai") ab paanchon locales ke liye login page par anuvadit hote hain. Change password modal: Sabhi change-password API error aur success sandesh ab change-password modal mein anuvadit hote hain. API reference: Authentication & Security API docs sabhi error aur success codes ko list karte hain aur batate hain ki unka i18n ke liye kaise upyog karen.
documents.s: Auth API truti aur safalta codes (i18n)

documents.t: Server filter width: Backup suchnaayein form mein server filter width badha di gayi hai (260px → 360px) behtar upyogita ke liye. Bulk selection: Backup sankhya ke liye sahi pluralization support ke saath bulk selection UI ko behtar banaya gaya hai. Help tooltips: Page naam context ke saath help tooltip text ko behtar banaya gaya hai.

Configuration page ka naam badla: Timezone aur bhasha configuration page ka naam configure-tz-lang se badalkar configure-tz kar diya gaya hai. Notification templates guide: Naye templeit bhasha selector, reset buttons, aur bhasha vyavhaar ko document karne ke liye user guide ko update kiya gaya hai. Multi-language documentation: User guide ab user menu mein bhasha selector ke maadhyam se interface bhasha ko badalne ka tareeka document karta hai.

Database Migration Ki Zaroorat Nahi: Is release ke liye kisi bhi database schema changes ki zaroorat nahi hai. Locale Support: Environment variable LANG ka ab istemaal nahi kiya jaata hai. Aap notifications ke liye bhasha Settings > Templates page par define kar sakte hain.

Sanskaran 1.3.2 ek maintenance release hai jo dependencies mein security vulnerabilities ko address karta hai, pnpm install warnings (peer webpack aur deprecated subdependencies) ko fix karta hai, app aur documentation mein lint aur build warnings ko resolve karta hai, aur vartaman Docker script names aur package versions ko reflect karne ke liye documentation ko update karta hai.

Dependabot dependency updates (documentation): Documentation workspace mein vulnerabilities ko address karne ke liye do Dependabot PRs merge kiye gaye: ajv /documentation mein: 8.17.1 se 8.18.0 aur 6.12.6 se 6.14.0 tak update kiya gaya. fast-xml-parser /documentation mein: 5.3.5 se 5.3.8 tak update kiya gaya. Dono ko /documentation ke liye dependabot multi-update ke through merge kiya gaya. High-severity vulnerabilities ke liye pnpm overrides: Char high-severity issues ko fix karne ke liye pnpm overrides add kiye gaye: minimatch (>=3.1.4): documentation > @docusaurus/core > serve-handler > minimatch mein GHSA-3ppc-4f35-3m26 (repeated wildcards ke through ReDoS), GHSA-7r86-cg39-jmmj (combinatorial backtracking), aur GHSA-23c5-xmqv-rm74 (nested extglobs backtracking) ko fix karta hai. serialize-javascript (>=7.0.3): webpack > terser-webpack-plugin > serialize-javascript mein GHSA-5c6j-r48x-rmvq (RegExp.flags aur Date.prototype.toISOString() ke through RCE) ko fix karta hai.

pnpm install chetaavaniyaan: Teen install-samay ki chetaavaniyaan hal kien: (1) webpack@5.104.1 se next-intlayer > @intlayer/webpack (project mein webpack 5.105.3 hai) se unmet peer ko root package.json mein pnpm.peerDependencyRules.allowedVersions.webpack: "5" jodkar hal kiya. (2) Deprecated subdependencies prebuild-install@7.1.3 (better-sqlite3 se) aur whatwg-encoding@3.1.1 (documentation > docusaurus-search-local > cheerio se) ko pnpm.allowedDeprecatedVersions jodkar hal kiya taaki install chetaavaniyon ke bina chale. Application logs viewer (exhaustive-deps): Auto-scroll effect ke liye react-hooks/exhaustive-deps chetaavani hal ki. logData ko intentional taur par dependency array se chhod diya gaya hai taaki scrolling kewal tab ho jab auto-scroll ya selected file badle, har poll par nahin; new-line scrolling loadLogs mein handle kiya gaya hai. Ek eslint-disable-next-line ek chhote comment ke saath joda gaya hai. Build warning vscode-languageserver-types (documentation): Webpack "Critical dependency: require function is used in a way in which dependencies cannot be statically extracted" ko transitive dependency vscode-languageserver-types (intlayer-editor se) ke liye documentation (Docusaurus) build mein suppress kiya gaya hai, documentation/docusaurus.config.ts mein ek inline plugin ke dwara jo ignoreWarnings jodta hai. Chetaavani kewal docs build ke dauraan hoti hai, main app ke nahin.

Docker script names: Documentation mein ab current npm/pnpm script names use hote hain: docker-up → docker:up, docker-down → docker:down, docker-clean → docker:clean, docker-devel → docker:devel. AGENTS.md aur documentation (setup.md, devel.md, release-management.md) mein update kiya gaya. Package versions: Documentation aur project rules package.json se match karne ke liye update kiye gaye: pnpm 10.30.3, TypeScript ^5.9.3, Next.js ^16.1.6, React ^19.2.4, Tailwind CSS ^4.2.1, intlayer family ^8.1.8, lucide-react ^0.575.0, react-day-picker ^9.14.0, react-hook-form ^7.71.2, ESLint ^9.16.0, webpack ^5.105.3. AGENTS.md, documentation/docs/development/setup.md, documentation/docs/development/development-guidelines.md, aur .cursor/rules/project-rule.mdc mein update kiya gaya.

Version 1.3.2 mein upgrade karte samay: No database migration required: Is release ke liye kisi database schema change ki zaroorat nahi hai. Docker commands: Agar aap documented pnpm scripts use karte hain, to pichle pnpm docker:up, pnpm docker:down, ityadi ke bajaye pnpm docker:clean, pnpm docker:devel, docker-up, aur docker-down use karein. Dependencies: Updated lockfile aur overrides ko apply karne ke liye pnpm install run karein; typical installations ke liye kisi manual dependency change ki zaroorat nahi hai.

Theek kiya gaya: pnpm install chetaavaniyaan — peer webpack (allowedVersions) aur deprecated subdependencies (prebuild-install, whatwg-encoding) root package.json mein allowedDeprecatedVersions ke dwara. Theek kiya gaya: Application logs viewer useEffect exhaustive-deps chetaavani (iradatan dependency array; comment ke saath eslint-disable joda gaya). Theek kiya gaya: Build chetaavani vscode-languageserver-types documentation mein (Docusaurus) docusaurus.config.ts mein ignoreWarnings ke dwara. Suraksha: Documentation workspace mein ajv aur fast-xml-parser ke liye Dependabot updates. Suraksha: minimatch (>=3.1.4) aur serialize-javascript (>=7.0.3) ke liye pnpm overrides uchch-gambhīrtā wale suraksha khamiyon ko dur karne ke liye. Badla gaya: Documentation ko Docker script naamon (docker:up, docker:down, docker:clean, docker:devel) ke saath update kiya gaya. Badla gaya: Documentation aur project niyam package.json se vartaman package sanskaranon ke saath update kiye gaye.

Sanskaran 1.4.1 dashboard anubhav mein mahatvapurn sudhaar laata hai jismein inline chart niyantran, behtar filtering kshamataen, pranali vastu shaili samarthan, aur sthaniya format vikalp shamil hain. Yah release chart rendering, backup vivaran load hone, aur server connectivity ka pata lagane ko prabhavit karne wali kai trutiyon ko bhi theek karti hai. Iske alawa, dependencies mein suraksha kamzoriyon ko hal kar diya gaya hai.

Chart samay pariman selector: Chart panel headers mein stock-chart-shaili ke pill buttons (1W | 2W | 1M | 3M) jo Display Settings mein navagate kiye bina tezi se samay pariman badalne ke liye hain. Display Settings ke saath state share karta hai. Chart shaili toggle (mudda #54): Chart panel header se seedhe line aur bar charts ke beech switch karne ke liye toggle button. Sabhi panels mein persist aur sync hota hai. Saral samay pariman: 7 vikalpon se ghatakar 4 kendrit pariman (1 Saptah, 2 Saptah, 1 Maah, 3 Maah) kar diye gaye hain, jismein 1 Maah naya default hai.

Pranali vastu shaili samarthan: Display Settings mein ab "Pranali (OS ka palan karen)" vikalp shamil hai jo aapke operating system ki ujjwal/andhakar pasand ko svatah mel karta hai. Format sthaniya override (mudda #59): Upyogkarta Settings > Display Settings mein UI bhaasha se svatantr ek formatting sthaniya chun sakte hain (416 sthaniya samarthit hain). Taareekh, samay, aur sankhya formatting chune hue format sthaniya ka palan karti hai jismein live preview hota hai.

Dashboard server filter: Khoj field app header mein auto-refresh aur toolbar kriyaon ke saath sthanantarit. Control khali hone par kewal khoj icon dikhata hai; hover/click karne par text field khulta hai. Behtar filter mel (mudda #53): Filter ab server id, URL, aur kisi bhi backup job naam se mel karta hai. Filter badalne par overview card grid update na hone ki samasya theek ki gayi. Settings filtering: Settings > Backup Monitoring aur Settings > Servers mein server list mein filter input joda gaya hai.

Rolling time windows: Samay pariman ab rolling din windows ka upyog karte hain: 1S = antim 7 din, 2S = antim 14 din, 1M = antim 30 din, 3M = antim 90 din (pehle calendar-aadhaarit). Data consolidation: Sabhi chart data points calendar din ke anusar consolidated kiye jaate hain bucketing se pehle. Ek din mein kai backups ko uchit roop se aggregate kiya jaata hai. Limited data points: Behtar performance aur readability ke liye charts ab adhiktam 30 data points enforce karte hain. Tooltip saralikaran: Tooltip ab samay aur taareekh (jaise "5/12/26") ke bajay kewal taareekh dikhata hai.

UTC-aadhaarit gananaen: Agla apekshit backup aur vilambit pata lagana ab UTC mein intervals aur saptah ke din ki jaanch ko aage badhata hai, na ki sthaniya samay mein, jisse host timezone dwara DST paar karne par ek-ghante ki UTC drift se bacha jaata hai. Badhi hui vilambit tolerance: Naye installs aur defaults ab vilambit tolerance ke liye 1 ghante ke bajay 2 ghante ka upyog karte hain.

Connectivity loss detection: /api/ping endpoint aur 30-second header-aadhaarit connectivity probe joda gaya hai. Refresh aur auto-refresh mein vifalta ab raw error text ko expose kiye bina lost-connection modal kholti hai. UI preferences persistence: Race conditions ko theek kiya gaya hai jiske karan user UI preferences (overview side panel, chart samay pariman, chart shaili) page refresh hone par persist nahi hote the.

Duplicati remote access spashtikaran (mudda #40): Documentation ab spasht karti hai ki Duplicati remote access vaikalpik hai aur kewal tabhi avashyak hai jab Duplicati UI ke liye seedhe links ki avashyakta ho.

Overview charts panel samay pariman filter ko nazarandaaz kar raha hai: Panel dwara chune hue samay pariman ke bawajood sabhi data points dikhane ki samasya theek ki gayi. Panel ab uchit samay pariman parameters ke saath API se apna data fetch karta hai. Backup details par OOM crash (mudda #62): Queries aur UI rendering ko optimize karke JavaScript heap out of memory ko rok diya gaya hai. Backup logs ab ek saath sabhi ko load karne ke bajay on-demand fetch kiye jaate hain, jismein adhiktam 1000 lines hote hain. Backup version parsing (mudda #65): convertTimestampToISO() ab Duplicati dwara vibhinn system locales mein upyog ki jaane wali sabhi samanya locale-vishesh timestamp formats ko handle karta hai.

npm audit vulnerabilities: 7 vulnerabilities resolved (1 uchch, 6 madhyam): next ko 16.3.0-canary.19 mein update kiya gaya postcss@8.4.31 (XSS) ko theek karne ke liye .pnpmfile.cjs ko serialize-javascript@^7.0.5 (RCE, DoS) ko force karne ke liye add kiya gaya mermaid override ko >=11.14.1 mein update kiya gaya (4 madhyam vulnerabilities) Spasht postcss@^8.5.14 aur serialize-javascript@^7.0.5 dependencies jodi gayin pnpm overrides: Transitive uuid >=14.0.0 aur postcss >=8.5.10 ke liye root pnpm.overrides add kiya gaya. Uchch-severity vulnerabilities: minimatch >=3.1.4 aur serialize-javascript >=7.0.3 ke liye pnpm overrides ke madhyam se 4 uchch-severity vulnerabilities theek ki gayin.

Sanskaran 1.4.1 mein upgrade karte samay: Database migration ki avashyakta nahin: Is release ke liye kisi bhi database schema parivartan ki avashyakta nahin hai. Naya default vilambit tolerance: Naye installations mein 1 ghante ke bajay 2 ghante ka default vilambit tolerance hoga. Maujooda settings mein koi parivartan nahin hoga. Chart pasandeeda: Chart samay pariman aur shaili pasandeeda ab alag tarah se store kiye jate hain aur upgrade ke baad default (1 Mahina, Rekha chart) par reset ho jayenge. Dependencies: Updated lockfile aur overrides ko laagoo karne ke liye pnpm install run karen.

Sanskaran 1.4.2 ek maintenance release hai jo vyaapak bhaasha samarthan, vishwasaniyata, aur dependency hygiene par kendrit hai. Ismein ek poori tarah se localized Simplified Chinese aur Hindi (Roman) antarmukh prastut kiya gaya hai, dakyumenteshan ko saat bhaashayon mein vistaar kiya gaya hai, aur ek mahatvapurn Docker startup crash, saath hi kuch dashboard aur server merge issues ka samadhan kiya gaya hai. Nirbharataen bhi update ki gayi hain, jismein nodemailer ka ek mukhya upgrade shamil hai.

Simplified Chinese aur Hindi (Roman) antarmukh: Aplikeshan antarmukh ab Simplified Chinese aur Hindi (Roman) mein poori tarah se uplabdh hai, jo English, French, German, Spanish, aur Brazilian Portuguese mein shamil ho gaya hai. Sammaan mein bhaasha menu se unhein chunein. Vistaarit dakyumenteshan bhaashayen: Online dakyumenteshan ab saat bhaashayon mein prakaashit hoti hai, jo maujood anuvadon ke saath Hindi (Roman) aur Simplified Chinese jodti hai.

Stabl server identity kab log collect karte hai: Kab backup log collect karte hai, duplistatus ab Duplicati machine name ko tumhare existing server se match karta hai aur reuse karta hai us server ka record, jaise ki Duplicati ka machine ID par depend karne ke bajaye. Iska matlab hai ki backup itihas ko same server se attach rakhte hai, jaise ki Duplicati ka machine ID badal jaye (for example, after a reinstall), jiske karan duplicate server entries kam hote hai.

Naya bhaasha suchi: README aur dastavej ab sabhi saat samarthit bhaashaon ka varnan karte hain aur pratyek anuvaadit sanskaran ka link dete hain. Dastavej bhaasha menu jhanda: Naye Hindi aur Simplified Chinese dastavej ke liye jhanda icons jode gaye hain, aur Portuguese ko ekta ke liye Portugal jhande par switch kiya gaya hai. Jhande ab Windows, Linux, aur Chromium par bina kisi external font downloads ke vishwasniya roop se render hote hain. Duplicate-servers margdarshan ka vistaar: Upyogkarta guide ab duplicated servers ke dono kaaranon ka varnan karti hai (badla hua Duplicati machine ID, aur ek Duplicati API bug jo identity ID aur machine ID ko milata hai) aur Duplicati taraf se workaround ko duplistatus merge kadam ke saath dastavej karti hai.

Load par kam sign-in jaanchen: Dashboard ab aapka vartaman upyogkarta ek baar lata hai aur ise poore prushth (header, settings guard, vastu shaili aur widgets) mein baanta hai, balki har component alag se maangne ke bajaye, jab prushth load hota hai to faltu anurodhon ko kam karta hai.

Docker startup crash: Container shuru hote waqt ek crash ko theek kiya jo Cannot find module '.../@swc/helpers/...' report karta tha, jo shayad aplikeshan ke shuru hone se rok sakta tha. Containers ab niyamit roop se shuru hote hain. Duplicate dashboard praveshtiyan: Dashboard ab usi backup ke liye ek se adhik patriyon nahi dikhata jab kayi rekord same latest Backup Taareekh ko baante hain. Duplicate servers ka vilayan: Servers ka vilayan ab duplicate Duplicati backup IDs ko bhi jodta hai jo same Backup Naam baante hain, aur sabse naye backup se ID rakhta hai. Vilayan kriyaayan ab Audit log mein darj hoti hain.

nodemailer ko 9.x mein upgrade kiya gaya: Email library ko nayi major sanskaran mein update kiya gaya. v9 mein ekmatra breaking change (remote attachment, OAuth2, ya proxy content lane waqt kathor TLS valideshan) duplistatus ko prabhavit nahi karta, jo sirf inline text aur HTML email bhejta hai. Anya dependency updates: Kai build aur type dependencies ko unki nayi anukool sanskaranon mein refresh kiya gaya.

Sanskaran 1.4.2 mein upgrade karte samay: Koi database migration aavashyak nahi: Is release mein koi database schema parivarton ki zaroorat nahi hai. Dependencies: Update kiye gaye lockfile aur overrides lagane ke liye pnpm install chalayen. Koi configuration parivarton ki zaroorat nahi: Vartamaan sammaan, jisme aapki chuni gayi bhaasha shamil hai, surakshit hain.

Bugs report karte samay, kripya shamil karein: Sanskaran: 1.4.2 Operating system aur sanskaran Docker/podman sanskaran Container type (Docker ya podman/Pod) Truti sandesh aur logs Punarutpadan ke liye steps

Jodha: Poora Simplifaiyd Chini aur Hindi (Roman) upyogkarta anveshan. Jodha: Abaa dokumantashan saat bhaashao me uplabdh hai, jisme Hindi (Roman) aur Simplifaiyd Chini shamil hai. Badlaava: Bakap log sangrah aba Duplicati mashin naam se server ko pahachaanata hai (mauzud rakhne wale record ko phir se upyog karta hai), jisse ki itihas bhi machine ID badalne par bhi lagaa rakhaya jaata hai. Badlaava: Dokumantashan bhaasha menu me naye sthaan ke liye jhande jodhe gaye hai aur Portugees ke liye Portugal ka jhanda upyog kiya gaya hai. Badal diya gaya: Doksumenteshan aur README ko saare samarthit bhashaon ka vivran karne aur duura-server samasya-nivaaran maargdarshan ko vishal karne ke liye aapdat kiya gaya hai. Badal diya gaya: nodemailer ko 9.x tak upgrade kiya aur dusre banane/prakar aavashyaktaon ko taaza kiya. Sudhaar diya gaya: Docker shuru karne ke samay ek ghumit @swc/helpers modyul ke abhaav ke karan. Sudhaar diya gaya: Ek se jyada dashboard pravesh jab kee baar kee baackap kee sabse aakhiri taareekh ek hi ho. Thik kiya gaya: Duplicate servers ko maerga karne se ab duplicate backup IDs bhi consolidate ho jaatay hain aur audit log mein record hota hai. Thik kiya gaya: Dashboard load karne ke waqt redundant sign-in checks ko kam kiya gaya hai.
